Name: Grupo Ritex
Description:
Nuestra historia comienza en el barrio porteño de Villa Crespo en el año 1962, fruto del esfuerzo de una familia dedicada a la industria textil.

A partir del año 1982 nuestras actividades industriales textiles se radicaron en el Parque Industrial de la Ciudad de La Rioja, es así que nuestro nombre RITEX surge como un fiel reflejo de los lazos de unión fraternal entre ambas.

Nuestro constante desarrollo nos ha permitido posicionarnos como una de las más grandes empresas de la industria textil de la Argentina. Contamos con el respaldo y experiencia obtenidos en nuestra vasta trayectoria, como así también con la agilidad y la destreza necesarias e indispensables para dar respuesta a las exigencias del dinámico mercado textil actual.

Nuestro compromiso es brindar la mejor atención personalizada y el asesoramiento a nuestros clientes, aportando experiencia e innovación permanente que, unidas al trabajo en conjunto entre nuestro Departamento de Diseño y Desarrollo con los clientes, hacen posible la obtención de productos de alta calidad acordes a la vanguardia del mundo de la moda.

We are a small but mighty printing company founded by two high school friends with a passion for making people look good (on paper, at least). But as it turns out, adults need cool stuff too, so we've expanded our services to include printing on all kinds of apparel.

Our Services
At The Golden Prints, we use state-of-the-art equipment and a whole lot of elbow grease to bring your custom apparel to fruition. From t-shirts to water bottles (even toiletry bags!), we have you covered.  Send us a message and we can get your custom apparel to you!

Our Customers
We are proud to have worked with a diverse range of customers, from small businesses and startups to large corporations and non-profit organizations. Whether you're in need of a few custom t-shirts for your kickball team or a large order of branded apparel for your business, we've got you covered.

Name: Tulum Fashions
Description:
Founded in 2007, Tulum Fashions is a company specializing in full-package manufacturing of high-quality garments. With our factory located in Medellín, Colombia, and offices in Miami, we bridge the gap between craftsmanship and global markets, delivering exceptional products to our clients worldwide.

What We Do

We specialize in the production of both knit and woven garments, including casual wear, swimwear, resort wear, and custom designs tailored to our clients’ unique needs. With a monthly production capacity of 50,000 garments, we offer reliable and efficient manufacturing services, ensuring every piece meets the highest standards of quality.

Our Mission

At Tulum Fashions, our mission is to bring ideas to life by providing seamless production solutions that empower brands and retailers to grow and thrive. Beyond manufacturing, we believe in making a positive impact on society. We are proud to provide opportunities to individuals who often lack access to formal employment, equipping them with the skills and training needed to excel in garment production.

Key Achievements
	•	Successfully partnered with international brands, helping them transform their designs into high-quality finished products.
	•	Established a reputation for reliability and precision in the competitive garment manufacturing industry.
	•	Maintained a robust, skilled team dedicated to delivering outstanding results for over 17 years.
	•	Participated in renowned industry events like MAGIC Las Vegas, building strong connections with global brands.
	•	Contributed to the local economy by creating formal job opportunities and fostering professional growth in our workforce.

Whether you’re a growing brand or an established retailer, Tulum Fashions is your trusted partner for all your garment manufacturing needs. Let us help you turn your vision into reality.

 Locations: Medellín, Colombia (Factory) | Miami, Florida (Offices)
 Contact: jose@tulumfashions.com

Welcome to Resham Zone - Your B2B Apparel Destination | Crafting Quality Apparel Since 2002  | Custom Hoodies, Sportswear, Leather Goods | Join Our Global Community Today 

Welcome to Resham Zone - Your Premier Destination for Exceptional Apparel!

At Resham Zone, we take immense pride in our rich heritage of crafting high-quality apparel. Established in 2002 in the vibrant industrial city of Sialkot, Pakistan, we have consistently delivered top-notch hoodies, sweatshirts, sportswear, leather jackets, leather wallets, leather belts, and gym clothes.

Our Commitment to Quality:

For over two decades, our journey has been defined by an unwavering commitment to quality and customer satisfaction. Every stitch, every design, and every product that bears our name reflects our dedication to excellence. We prioritize our customers' needs and work tirelessly to exceed their expectations.

A Fresh Start in the Online World:

While our parent company has been a local manufacturing powerhouse, we are thrilled to embark on a new chapter of our story - expanding our reach to the global market. With the launch of our online business, we are bringing the finest apparel from Sialkot's renowned industries to customers worldwide.

Custom Creations, Unmatched Quality:

What sets us apart is our ability to bring your unique apparel visions to life. We specialize in crafting custom designs tailored to your exact specifications. Whether you require personalized uniforms for your team, branded merchandise, or fashion-forward pieces, we're here to make it happen.

Explore Our Showcase on Instagram:

To get a glimpse of our exquisite creations, we invite you to visit our Instagram page, where we regularly update our portfolio with our latest designs and products. Follow us @reshamzones for inspiration and a closer look at what we offer.

Name: Delux Zipper
Description:
Who We Are —— Professional Zipper Manufacturer
◎Our main products are coil zipper, metal zipper, plastic zipper with slider and puller.

◎Masterful Customization
In order to better serve customers and meet different requirements, gold, silver, rose gold, colorful and other metallic colors are available for all the different series of zippers. Zipper tape can be processed with printing, laser, splash water waterproof and so on. The metal zipper has a complete set of colors with advanced technology and suitable for double enzyme wash.

◎Whether you’re looking for affordable or high-quality metal or plastic zipper for your market, Delux Zipper has all your zipper needs under one roof!

In addition, Delux has backward integration capabilities such as dyeing, plating, painting, sliders and parts production, which can reduce the risk and vulnerability of the whole supply chain.

◎Delux owns a zipper testing laboratory, color checking light box, needle detection instrument, etc. Customization according to customers' requirements is workable, can meet the zipper technical standards of ASTM ANSI (USA), BS (UK), DIN (Germany), JIS (Japan) and GB/T2171-2173.

◎Delux brand has been created with artisan spirit and fully recognized and trusted by domestic and overseas customers, such as Samsonite,Superdry,Jackwolfskin ,Thule and Bree ,etc.

Name: 50 Star US
Description:
At 50, we are inspired by the 50 stars on our national banner — a symbol of freedom, responsibility, and trust. That same spirit guides how we conduct business, always in full compliance with the laws and regulations of our great nation.

With 30 years of experience in Bangladeshi textile production, we understand nearly every requirement buyers seek today — from fiber to fashion. Concepts like sustainability, recycling, and ethical business models aren’t trends for us; they’ve been part of our DNA for decades.

 By owning and operating our own certified factory, we offer buyers a complete sourcing solution:
 Flat knitwear expertise (sweaters, cardigans, plus-size knit tops)
 Compliance-backed production (BSCI, WRAP, OEKO-TEX, Sedex)
 Direct-to-warehouse delivery in the U.S. for seamless logistics
 Sustainable fibers and recycled yarn integration

If you’re a retailer or apparel buyer looking for a reliable, all-encompassing partner in knitwear sourcing, 50 is ready to deliver.

 Retail buyers — let’s connect.

Name: Solitex'Oise
Description:
SoliTex’Oise – Une plateforme textile solidaire au cœur de l’Oise
SoliTex’Oise est une structure à vocation sociale et environnementale, spécialisée dans la collecte, le tri, la valorisation et le réemploi des textiles, linges de maison, chaussures et accessoires.
Basée au 31 rue de l’Industrie à Beauvais, la plateforme agit pour une mode plus durable tout en créant de l’emploi local en insertion.

Chaque pièce collectée est triée à la main et orientée vers la solution la plus vertueuse : réemploi en friperie, recyclage matière ou dons à des associations.
SoliTex’Oise s’inscrit dans une logique d’économie circulaire et propose une alternative concrète à la surconsommation textile.


 La Friperie d’Usine – Le visage public de SoliTex’Oise
Située au 23 rue de l’Industrie à Beauvais, La Friperie d’Usine est la boutique ouverte au public de SoliTex’Oise.
On y trouve une sélection de vêtements, chaussures et accessoires de seconde main, à petits prix et en très bon état, issus directement de la plateforme de tri.

Acheter à la Friperie d’Usine, c’est :

- donner une seconde vie aux vêtements,
- soutenir la création d’emplois solidaires,
- et faire un geste pour la planète .

Horaires : Mardi au samedi de 12h à 18h
Adresse : 23 rue de l’Industrie, Beauvais

Representamos y distribuimos productos de cuatro prestigiosas marcas internacionales, asegurando que nuestros clientes tengan acceso a los mejores equipos de seguridad disponibles en el mercado global.

Nuestras Marcas y Productos
MCR Safety (EE.UU.): Guantes, protección ocular, calzado e indumentaria.
Helly Hansen (Noruega): Indumentaria y calzados técnicos laborales y para bajas temperaturas.
Sunfibre (República Checa): Fibra óptica de iluminación activa de alta visibilidad.
Support Jacket (Japón): Protectores lumbares para trabajos de carga de peso.

Misión y Visión
Nuestro compromiso es innovar en el mercado argentino ofreciendo productos de primera calidad en el rubro de EPP. Aspiramos a llegar a grandes empresas y garantizar la salud y seguridad de todos sus empleados.
Nacimos en 2023 con un enfoque inicial en el rubro deportivo y rápidamente expandimos nuestra presencia en el sector industrial. En mayo 2024, participamos por primera vez como expositores en la Expo Minera en San Juan, donde logramos establecer valiosos contactos en las industrias del cobre y oro. Este éxito nos impulsó a participar en Argentina Mining Salta en agosto 2024 y Arminera La Rural en mayo 2025.
Lo que nos distingue es la calidad única de nuestros productos, reconocida por varios expertos en seguridad e higiene. Además, como una empresa joven y dinámica, estamos completamente dedicados a ofrecer un trato excepcional a nuestros clientes, brindando confianza y soporte en todo momento.

En Muni Work, estamos comprometidos con la excelencia y la innovación, protegiendo a los trabajadores con los mejores equipos disponibles en el mercado. Unite a nosotros en nuestro viaje para mejorar la seguridad laboral en Argentina con lo mejor del mercado global.

Équipée d'outils de production polyvalents et performants, l'entreprise emploie aujourd'hui 400 personnes et a une capacité de production de 5000 pièces par jour.
Nos produits sont principalement destinés aux marchés européens (France, Italie, Espagne, Grande-Bretagne et Allemagne) pour des partenaires engagés parmi les marques les plus prestigieuses et renommées.

Since 1982, MARISA develops and fabricates middle and high end clothing ( pants, skirts, dresses, blouses and jumpsuits .. ), casual wear, available in dyed and ready-to-dye versions ( special treatments, garments .. ) and also ready to wear clothing.
Marisa gained a remarkable position throughout the years as a medium and high-end segment brand. In order to align with its activity, which is mainly ’’ Finished product oriented, MARISA has a material’s team work and accessories sourcing, an eﬃcient development and industrialization structure, and a dedicated prototyping workshop.
Equipped with versatile and high-performing production tools, the company employs 400 people today and has a production capacity of 5000 pieces/day.
Our products are mainly destined to European Markets (France, Italy, Spain, Great Britain and Germany) for committed partners among the most prestigious and renowned brands.

Name: Zammis
Description:
The world's first platform that brings multiple clothing brands together to collaborate and thrive in one unified space. We are proud to introduce a groundbreaking concept that revolutionizes the fashion industry.

At Zammis, we believe in the power of collaboration and offer a unique opportunity for clothing brands to join forces and create a powerful business presence. Our platform serves as a hub where brands can connect, collaborate, and reach new heights together.

Our mission is to provide a global stage for our listed brands. We are committed to offering unparalleled marketing strategies that exceed expectations. We are dedicated to ensuring that our brands receive the international exposure they deserve, enabling them to expand their reach and make a lasting impact.

Zammis is more than just a platform – it's a community driven by creativity, innovation, and human connection. We understand the value of personal interaction in an increasingly automated world. Our platform is designed to foster meaningful connections, empowering brands to turn their ideas into successful businesses.

As a company, we prioritize sustainability and responsibility. We are passionate about making a positive impact that extends beyond our own business. We strive to lead by example, championing sustainable practices, and inspiring others to embrace these ideals.

Join us at Zammis, where boundaries are pushed, creativity thrives, and new possibilities emerge. Together, we can redefine the fashion industry, unlock untapped potential, and shape a future where collaboration is the key to success.

Name: Velocity Plotters & Cutters Latam
Description:
En Velocity Plotters ofrecemos soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas en impresión, corte y digitalización de patrones, diseñadas para transformar los procesos de diseño y producción en industrias como la confección, la moda, el calzado, el mobiliario, la tapicería automotriz, la decoración de interiores y la aeronáutica.

Nuestra tecnología incluye:

- Plotters de impresión de patrones y moldes: Plotters de alta velocidad y precisión, compatibles con sistemas CAD como Gerber, Optitex, TukaTech, Audaces y muchas más.

- Plotters de impresión y corte de patrones: Soluciones todo en uno. Integra tanto las funciones de impresión como de corte en una sola máquina, ofreciendo una solución integral para los creadores de patrones y marcadas (tizadas).

- Máquina de Corte Automática Mono-Capa: Es una máquina potente e inteligente que resulta adecuada para diversas industrias. Es capaz de cortar con precisión y eficiencia una variedad de materiales blandos y algunos materiales difíciles de cortar, ofreciendo la máxima calidad y precisión.

- Máquina de Corte de Alta Capacidad: Es una avanzada máquina de corte diseñada para entornos de producción de alto volumen. Su tecnología de última generación garantiza precisión, velocidad y eficiencia, manejando materiales que van desde telas delicadas hasta textiles densos como denim y Kevlar. Diseñada para minimizar el desperdicio de material mientras maximiza la productividad.

- Sistema de digitalización de patrones: Tecnología avanzada que permite convertir patrones físicos en formatos digitales con alta precisión.

- Software CAD especializado: Especial para diseño, creación de patrones y planificación de marcadas, que optimizan cada etapa del proceso productivo.

Name: TENDRE BAISER
Description:
Bienvenue chez Tendre Baiser 

Notre mission est simple : offrir de la lingerie grande taille qui allie confort, style et qualité, tout en respectant la diversité des corps. Trouver des pièces qui vous correspondent parfaitement ne devrait plus être un défi, et c’est pourquoi nous avons créé Tendre Baiser : une marque pensée pour vous et avec vous.

Ce qui fait notre différence ?
 Qualité avant tout : Nos collections sont produites en petites séries, avec une attention rigoureuse à chaque étape de la production.
 Authenticité et fait main : Certaines pièces sont confectionnées à la main avec des matériaux d’exception, garantissant beauté et durabilité.
 Sur-mesure : Parce que chaque corps est unique, nous proposons des créations sur-mesure pour un ajustement parfait à chaque silhouette.
 Précommandes responsables : Nous privilégions une approche responsable pour limiter le gaspillage en produisant seulement ce qui est nécessaire.

Tendre Baiser, c’est plus qu’une marque : c’est l’occasion de célébrer la diversité des corps et la confiance en soi. Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir nos collections et participer à cette belle aventure !

Name: Teofilów S.A.
Description:
Teofilów S.A. jest polską firmą z ponad  pięćdziesięcioletnią tradycją produkcji i sprzedaży dzianin, cenionych zarówno w kraju, jak i za granicą.

Wyznacznikiem wysokiej jakości są m.in., pochodzące od renomowanych producentów europejskich, barwniki i środki chemiczne, które Spółka używa do wykańczania dzianin oraz nowoczesny park maszynowy znanych producentów: maszyny dziewiarskie ORIZIO, TERROT, MAYER; maszyny wykańczalnicze BIANCO, BRUCKNER, LAFER, STORK, SALVADE, COMATEX, SUCKER-MUELLER, THIES, WEISS, MCS oraz CORINO i drukarki cyfrowe SPG JAVELIN najnowszej generacji.

Wydziały produkcyjne wyposażone w automatyczne systemy dozowania barwników i chemikaliów oraz wysoki stopień skomputeryzowania pozwalają na sprawną obsługę procesów produkcyjnych.

Dzięki nowoczesnym procesom technologicznym, stałej modernizacji parku maszynowego oraz dokonywanym inwestycjom Teofilów S.A. jest w stanie zaoferować szeroką gamę dzianin najwyższej jakości spełniających różnorodne oczekiwania klientów reprezentujących wiele segmentów odbiorców - głównie firm konfekcyjnych produkujących odzież niemowlęcą, dziecięcą, bieliznę, odzież młodzieżową, sportową, damską, reklamową, pościel i inne, jak również firm handlowych.

Dzianiny produkowane są z przędz bawełnianych, poliestrowych, wiskozowych, poliamidowych, bambusowych, lycry i innych przędz elastomerowych.

W ostatnim okresie Teofilów S.A. rozwija produkcję tzw. bio-dzianin, które dzięki zastosowaniu jako surowca bawełny organicznej, w całości powstają w ekologicznym procesie odpowiadającym oczekiwaniom rynku związanym z ochroną środowiska.

Name: SCHOTT NYC EUROPE
Description:
The Classic American Success Story.
Schott's heritage is a true-blue, real-deal, piece of Americana. The iconic styles produced by hand for over 100 years have become infused in American culture and have served as battle flags for the American spirit.

Iconic jackets
From 1928 until today, the history of Schott is marked by many key dates, here are some of them: creation and marketing of the first biker jacket that Irving will call Perfecto, participation in the design of bomber jackets for the US Air Corps and coats in collaboration with the US Navy, creation of jackets for the American Police as well as the creation of the first goose feather parkas.

An iconic brand
Over time, Schott has never stopped perfecting all of his iconic models. Schott is universally recognized as a key player and a major influencer in the fashion and artistic world. Today, the Schott family at their New Jersey plant still lives up to the core values of founder Irving as they wait to welcome the fifth generation of Schott.

Name: blankco
Description:
BLANKCO offers a convenient and straightforward method to create custom labels, merchandise for your business, or team uniforms without incurring additional expenses associated with developing bespoke products.
END-TO-END SOLUTION
We offer an end-to-end solution for brands, from the initial design consultation to manufacturing and packaging, providing a hassle-free experience that lets brands focus on selling and promoting their products.
MADE-TO-ORDER (MTO) APPROACH
Made-to-order model allows for customization in sizes, colors, and designs, enhancing customer satisfaction and engagement.
Since products are manufactured based on demand, brands/companies don't need large storage spaces, reducing costs associated with warehousing and inventory holding.
NO TO OVERSTOCK
Even the most eco-friendly won't make it a sustainable solution if the product is overproduced. We focus on meeting the demand and reducing excess inventory, leading to significantly less waste. It’s an environmentally friendly alternative, aligning with the growing demand for sustainable practices in the fashion industry.
SEAMLESS BRAND INTEGRATION
Fully customizable white-label clothing, allowing brands to seamlessly integrate their unique designs, logos, and tags, offering a product that truly represents their identity.

Name: Al Fatha Cone Dyeing
Description:
ABOUT US

Al Fatha Cone Dyeing is a distinguished name in the realm of poly yarn dyeing, offering specialized services that cater to the unique characteristics and demands of polymeric yarn materials. With a dedicated focus on quality, precision, and customization, the company has established itself as a leader in the niche of poly yarn dyeing.

Poly Yarn Specialization:

At the core of Al Fatha Cone Dyeing's expertise lies its proficiency in dyeing various types of poly yarns. This includes spun poly and filament poly, encompassing a range of specifications such as intermingle, non-intermingle cationic, BTL, and flat variations. The company's in-depth understanding of the intricacies of poly yarns allows it to provide tailored dyeing solutions for diverse industrial applications.

Cutting-Edge Dyeing Techniques for Poly Yarn:

Employing advanced dyeing technologies and methodologies, Al Fatha Cone Dyeing ensures that each poly yarn batch undergoes a precise and high-quality dyeing process. The company keeps pace with industry innovations, incorporating the latest techniques to achieve vibrant and durable colors on poly yarn materials.

Environmental Responsibility:

Al Fatha Cone Dyeing is committed to sustainable practices in poly yarn dyeing. Recognizing the importance of minimizing environmental impact, the company adopts eco-friendly dyeing processes and adheres to responsible business practices to contribute to a greener and more sustainable future.

Client-Centric Approach in Poly Yarn Dyeing:

Understanding the unique requirements of clients in various industries, Al Fatha Cone Dyeing takes a client-centric approach. The company collaborates closely with clients to understand their specific needs, providing customized poly yarn dyeing solutions that meet or exceed expectations.

Vision for Excellence:

Al Fatha Cone Dyeing envisions a future where it continues to be a pioneer in poly yarn dyeing, setting benchmarks for quality, innovation, and sustainability

Name: Maison Tricot
Description:
Maison Tricot, c’est plus qu’un label :

C’est un terrain de jeu créatif lancé par un collectif d’experts qui a décidé de remettre le tricot au cœur du lifestyle moderne.

On puise dans l’esthétique rétro, l’énergie vintage et la culture mode pour créer des pièces qui bousculent les codes.

Chaque création, chaque collaboration raconte une histoire, un héritage.

Chaque drop est une rencontre.
Une capsule exclusive.
Une histoire à porter.

Pas de collections classiques, pas de rythme imposé.
Chez Maison Tricot, on avance en collaboration avec des clubs de sport, des artistes, des médias, des événements culturels, des marques…

Chaque collab est un projet sur mesure, pensé comme une série limitée à fort impact.

Maison Tricot, c’est le tricot qui vit, qui s’exprime.

Name: budmil Zrt.
Description:
A budmil Zrt. több mint 30 éve elkötelezett a divat és a funkcionalitás tökéletes összhangja mellett. Fő célunk, hogy ügyfeleink számára kiváló minőségű, stílusos és kényelmes termékeket kínáljunk, amelyek minden alkalomra megfelelnek.

Cégünk folyamatosan figyelemmel kíséri a divatirányzatokat és a piaci igényeket, lehetővé téve számunkra, hogy mindig naprakész és vonzó kollekciókkal rukkoljunk elő. A tervezéstől a gyártásig minden folyamatot gondosan irányítunk, biztosítva ezzel a legmagasabb szintű minőséget és fenntarthatóságot.

Csapatunk szakértőkből áll, akik szenvedéllyel és kreativitással dolgoznak azon, hogy a Budmil név garancia legyen a megbízhatóságra és a stílusra. Bízunk benne, hogy termékeink inspirálják vásárlóinkat, és hozzájárulnak az önkifejezésükhöz.

Name: Atlantex Apparel
Description:
At Atlantex Apparel, we’re dedicated to providing premium blank apparel for screen printers, embroiderers, promotional product companies, uniform suppliers, blank apparel distributors, and fashion brands. Our commitment to quality goes beyond just fabric. We’re focused on sustainable and ethical manufacturing practices, ensuring our clients can make environmentally responsible choices. Every garment we produce is designed for comfort, durability, and quality, maintaining its form and vibrancy over time. At Atlantex, you’re not just buying blank apparel; you’re partnering with a team that supports your brand’s growth and success.

Whether you're developing a custom clothing line, sourcing blanks for resale, or outfitting a team, we’re here to provide reliable solutions tailored to your needs. Our team ensures a seamless experience from start to finish, assisting with product selection and logistics to guarantee timely delivery.

To learn more or place an order, visit our website at www.atlantexapparel.com, give us a call at (404) 882-3232, or drop by our office at 5965 Shiloh Rd E, Ste B1, Alpharetta, GA 30005. Let us help you bring your brand’s vision to life with blank apparel that stands the test of time.

Name: TradeFayr
Description:
At TradeFayr, our mission is to bridge the gap between global fashion brands and India’s finest apparel solutions suppliers. We are dedicated to increasing transparency in the sourcing process and making it easier for brands worldwide to find high-quality, sustainable clothing products.

What We Do

TradeFayr connects global fashion and home brands with over 150 verified suppliers, providing access to high-quality production, end-to-end supply chain solutions, low MOQs, competitive pricing, and worldwide shipping.

Unique Features

- In-House Support
- Expert Design Consultation
- Trend-Based Design Tools
- Secure easy transactions and trade guarantee: We provide secure transactions and trade guarantee  for buyers and sellers thus providing buyer protection from fraudulent suppliers and protecting the suppliers from fraudulent buyers.

Our Vision

We envision a future where every fashion house and upcoming brands has easy access to the highest quality sustainable fabrics, with a commitment to fair and impartial pricing. TradeFayr is here to transform the sourcing process, making it more transparent, efficient, and equitable for brands and suppliers alike.

Why Choose TradeFayr?

- Access to Verified Sustainable Suppliers
- Fair & Transparent Pricing
- Dedicated In-House Support
- Streamlined Sourcing Process – Save time & resources with our user-friendly platform, designed to simplify the sourcing journey that reduces complexity and maximizes value from initial contact to final delivery.
- Global Reach with Local Expertise – Benefit from TradeFayr’s deep understanding of the Indian textile market, combined with a global perspective to cater to customers globally.

Let’s Connect!

Ready to simplify your brand’s production journey? Let’s make sustainable fashion accessible, fair, and high-quality together. Follow us for updates, industry insights, and to see how we’re transforming the global fashion supply chain.

Name: 片山衣料株式会社
Description:
『制服』や『靴』『帽子』の企画・製造・卸・小売まで、新しい文化的創造をもってご利用者様方の快適な環境構築をサポートする会社です。
人は自他共にこれまで培ってきた認識や考え方があります。これについて一朝一夕に変えることは容易ではありません。しかしながら自らの外見、特に衣服に関してはシチュエーションに合わせ一日に何回でも簡単に変えることができます。
『衣服は人間の皮膚に次ぐ第二の皮膚である』という考え方がありますが、この考え方をビジネスの基本ともいわれる『5W1H』に当てはめ、Who（誰が）、When（いつ）、Where（どこで）、What（何を）、Why（なぜ）、How（どのように）その『第二の皮膚』を身にまとうか？ということは、現代に生きる我々にとってとても大きな意味を持ちます。
例えば清潔感のある整った服装は好印象を、だらしない・汚れた・明らかに的外れな場に合わない服装は悪印象を相手に与えるように、『第二の皮膚』は他者の認識に作用します。そして自身の認識にとっても、お気に入りの服を着たときに気分は高揚し、汚したりしないよう注意したりと行動パターンを変化させていくように、自然と自他の心の在り方を変えていく「ドレス効果」と呼ばれるチカラが備わっています。
当社が扱う『制服』『靴』『帽子』はオフィシャルな場で使用する『第二の皮膚』です。
身に着けることで外見に自信がつく、心が自然と前向きになる、公私のけじめ、オンオフの切り替え、仲間意識が生まれる。しっかりとトータルコーディネートでデザインされた『制服』と『靴』『帽子』には、年齢に関係なく自分自身の意識を変えると共に対面での印象（相手に与える認識・考え方・視認性）を良い方向に後押しし、着用する人にとってより良い未来を形成するためのチカラがあります。
当社はそのチカラを用いて、着用者様と周囲の地域コミュニティにとってよりよい生活環境の一助となるためのプランニングサービスを行っております。また、自社ブランド「KuFie's」では日本の制服の文化的およびコンテン価値に焦点を当て、それらを海外に輸出する事業に従事しています。

We are a company that supports the creation of a comfortable environment for our users through the planning, manufacturing, wholesale, and retail of "uniforms," "shoes," and "hats," with a focus on new cultural creation.
People have perceptions and ways of thinking that they have cultivated over time, and it is not easy to change these overnight. However, regarding one's appearance, especially clothing, it can be easily changed multiple times a day to suit different situations.
There is a concept that "clothing is the second skin of humans." When we apply this idea to the fundamental business principle of "5W1H" (Who, When, Where, What, Why, How), the question of how we adorn ourselves with this "second skin" holds significant meaning for us living in modern times.
For example, a neat and clean outfit creates a good impression, while sloppy, dirty, or clearly inappropriate clothing gives a bad impression. This "second skin" influences others' perceptions. Name: The Weaving Hope
Description:
About Us :

At "The Weaving Hope", we brought a weaving community; we are a thriving community of traditional weavers from the heartland of India. With a legacy steeped in rich cultural heritage and craftsmanship, we are passionate about preserving and celebrating the art of weaving that has been passed down through generations.

Our Mission: 

Our mission is to empower and uplift the skilled artisans of India by providing them with a platform to showcase their remarkable talents to the world. We strive to bridge the gap between traditional artistry and contemporary design, creating exquisite handwoven textiles that narrate stories of India's vibrant culture.

Our Craftsmanship:

Every masterpiece woven by our artisans tells a unique tale, each thread woven with dedication and love. We specialize in diverse traditional weaving techniques, such as intricate handlooms, delicate hand embroidery, and age-old dyeing methods. Our textiles are a testament to the artistry, patience, and skill our weavers pour into their work.

Our Products:

Discover a stunning collection of handwoven sarees, stoles, scarves, shawls, footwear, accessories and fabrics that reflect the kaleidoscope of colors and traditions that define India. Each piece blends timeless elegance and contemporary flair, making them perfect for every occasion, from casual outings to grand celebrations.

Empowering Communities:

We are committed to making a positive impact on the lives of our artisans. By supporting us, you are contributing to the upliftment of rural communities and helping preserve a heritage that is at the core of India's identity. Through fair trade practices, we ensure that our weavers receive the recognition and compensation they truly deserve.

Let's Connect:
Join our network of art enthusiasts, designers, and cultural aficionados who share our passion for reviving and promoting traditional weaving. Together, we can weave a brighter future for the artisans and showcase the splendor of India'

Name: SG Enterprises and Developers Australia
Description:
SG Enterprises and Developers | Driving Sustainable Innovation in Apparel & Textiles 

At SG Enterprises and Developers, we go beyond traditional textile and apparel supply. Based in Australia, we are a purpose-driven company committed to sustainability, environmental impact, and the circular economy. Our focus is not just on creating quality textile products—but on managing the entire Product Lifecycle (PLM), with a unique emphasis on Product End of Life (EOL) to reduce textile waste.

 Our Mission
To build a regenerative apparel and textile ecosystem where waste is minimized, partnerships are maximized, and people and planet always come first.

 What Sets Us Apart

End-to-End Product Lifecycle Management

EOL Solutions to Reduce Landfill and Ocean Waste

Collaboration with Like-Minded Sustainable Businesses

Transparent, Ethical, and Impact-Driven Operations

Deals in 100% Cotton only products

 Partner With Us
Whether you're an eco-conscious retailer, fashion brand, recycling innovator, or a sustainability advocate, SG is actively seeking partnerships that align with our mission. Together, we can develop scalable solutions that keep textiles in use and out of waste streams.

 Indian based company proudly distributing in Australia, with a global outlook and local heart.
Let’s build sustainable futures together—get in touch to learn more about our products, services, or partnership opportunities.

    Qualidade: Utilizamos materiais de alta qualidade e tecnologias de produção avançadas para garantir que cada peça de uniforme seja resistente e confortável.

    Uniformes Escolares: Duráveis e confortáveis, garantindo que os alunos estejam sempre prontos para o aprendizado.
    Serviços de Customização: Bordados, serigrafia e outros serviços de personalização para destacar a marca da sua empresa.

Nossa Localização

Estamos situados na Zona Leste de Manaus, estrategicamente posicionados para atender a toda a região com rapidez e eficiência. Nossa equipe está sempre pronta para oferecer um atendimento personalizado e encontrar a solução de fardamento perfeita para o seu negócio.

Guidés par notre passion commune pour la mode, nous avons pris la décision audacieuse en août dernier de quitter la plateforme Vinted pour donner naissance à ShopTaBall, une entreprise numérique axée sur une mission simple mais percutante : mettre à la disposition de tous des vêtements tendance à des prix abordables.

Dès décembre prochain, nous offrirons aux consommateurs l'opportunité unique d'acquérir un carton contenant trois pièces de marques telles que LEVIS, CARHARTT, LACOSTE et THENORTHFACE. Name: Greentexlife
Description:
The textile industry is one of the most polluting industries in the world. It accounts for 10% of global greenhouse gas emissions, 20% of freshwater pollution, and 20% of pesticide use.

In the healthcare sector, textiles represent about 10% of the waste produced by hospitals. These wastes are often single-use and therefore discarded after a single use.

The current manufacturing of textiles from natural or synthetic materials is environmentally unfriendly: it involves significant water, energy, and natural resource consumption, as well as environmental pollution (air, water).

Greentexlife offers a sustainable textile solution made from agricultural residues* without any chemical intervention and therefore recyclable.

This solution has numerous advantages, including:

Manufacturing with an excellent carbon footprint
Fabrics with unique characteristics such as comfort, longevity, reduced flammability, and hygroscopicity.

Using Greentexlife textiles is, therefore, a solution to improve the carbon footprint (scope 3) and thus reduce environmental impact while offering textiles that are pleasant to wear and use.

The textile offer includes:
            - bed linen, 
            - bath linen, 
            - kitchen linen,
            - professional clothing, 
            - diapers,
            - sanitary towels, hygienic underwear.

Greentexlife markets the Green Whisper technological solution for the healthcare and wellness sector in Europe.
www.green-whisper.com.

*The banana trunk is an agricultural residue, as the banana plant is monocarpic and monoblastic: it produces only one fruit before dying.

Chez DH Tissu, nous comprenons l'importance de reconnaître et de célébrer le travail acharné de vos équipes. C'est pourquoi nous avons créé des coffrets cadeaux sur mesure qui combinent l'élégance du tissu de qualité avec la personnalisation pour véhiculer votre gratitude de manière mémorable.

Ce qui rend nos coffrets cadeaux vraiment spéciaux, c'est la touche marocaine que nous apportons. Le Maroc est renommé pour sa riche tradition de tissage et d'artisanat, et nous nous inspirons de cette culture pour créer des cadeaux uniques. Nos coffrets cadeaux incluent une gamme variée de tissus de haute qualité, le tout personnalisable avec le logo de votre entreprise ou des messages de remerciement. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec vous pour concevoir des cadeaux qui reflètent l'identité de votre entreprise et renforcent les liens au sein de votre équipe, tout en rappelant la beauté et l'authenticité de la culture marocaine.

En choisissant DH Tissu, vous optez pour la qualité, l'originalité et une expérience culturelle authentique. Nos produits sont fabriqués avec soin et attention aux détails, ce qui en fait des cadeaux qui seront appréciés et mémorables.

Si vous êtes intéressés par l'idée de faire de cette saison des fêtes une occasion spéciale pour vos employés, je serais ravi de discuter de la personnalisation de nos coffrets cadeaux pour correspondre parfaitement à vos besoins. N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour en savoir plus ou pour programmer une réunion afin de vous présenter notre produit plus en détails.

Je vous remercie de votre temps et de votre considération.

Name: SAGE PRESENCE
Description:
INSTAGRAM : @sage.presence

Bienvenue chez Sage Présence, une marque française de prêt-à-porter qui incarne l'élégance et l'éthique d'une nouvelle ère de la mode. Nous sommes fiers de vous offrir une alternative à la consommation traditionnelle, en vous proposant des produits d'exception conçus avec soin, tout en préservant notre planète.

Chez Sage Présence, notre mission est claire : nous croyons qu'il est possible de se vêtir avec style sans compromettre nos valeurs. Notre engagement envers la durabilité et l'éthique est au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous concevons des vêtements intemporels, à la fois esthétiques et éco-responsables, pour ceux qui souhaitent affirmer leur style tout en préservant l'environnement.

Nos vêtements sont le reflet de notre engagement. Chaque pièce est fabriquée avec des matériaux durables de la plus haute qualité, dans le respect des normes éthiques les plus strictes. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec des artisans talentueux pour créer des collections qui incarnent à la fois la sophistication française et la conscience écologique.

Chez Sage Présence, nous croyons en une consommation réfléchie, axée sur la qualité plutôt que la quantité. Nous vous invitons à rejoindre notre communauté de consommateurs conscients qui cherchent à faire des choix éclairés. Nos vêtements sont conçus pour durer, résistant au passage du temps et aux tendances éphémères.

En choisissant Sage Présence, vous faites le choix de la mode qui a du sens. Nous vous invitons à explorer notre collection, à découvrir des pièces qui racontent une histoire de durabilité, d'éthique, et de style. Ensemble, changeons la manière dont nous consommons la mode, pour un monde plus sage, plus conscient, et plus élégant.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure. Sage Présence, une marque qui incarne le style éthique, sans compromis.

Name: Hurtownia Dodatków Krawieckich U Stefana
Description:
Od 35 lat dostarczamy dla Twojego biznesu dodatki krawieckie i pasmanterię.

 Zapewniamy dostępność najlepszych produktów na rynku. Współpracujemy z projektantami mody, producentami odzieży, markami mody, agencjami reklamowymi, szwalniami, krawcami, tapicerami, szkołami szycia, pracowniami krawieckimi, pasmanteriami oraz rękodzielnikami ułatwiając Ci zaopatrzenie Twojego sklepu, pracowni, szwalni.

 Dbamy o jakość oferowanych produktów, dlatego większość towaru pochodzi od polskich producentów i dostawców. W naszej szerokiej ofercie znajduje się ponad 12.000 produktów podzielonych na specjalistyczne grupy produktowe. Największą popularnością cieszą się nici, lamówki, tasiemki, wstążki, aplikacje, muliny, włóczki, kordonki, podszewki, filc, zamki, wstążki, koronki i wiele innych. Zapewniamy specjalistyczne flizeliny, klejonki, wkłady odzieżowe, włókniny, ociepliny czy pikówki. Świadczymy również usługi cięcia, pikowania oraz przewijania i mierzenia tkanin.

 Pomagamy zaoszczędzić Twój cenny czas, dlatego, że cały asortyment dostaniesz w jednym miejscu w kompleksowo zaopatrzonej hali o powierzchni 1000m2. Oferujemy duże stany magazynowe dostępne od ręki, dzięki czemu jesteśmy w stanie realizować zamówienia specjalne w rekordowym czasie. 

 Prowadzimy sprzedaż hurtową i detaliczną stacjonarnie w Poznaniu oraz online za pomocą platform B2B oraz B2C.

Jesteśmy rodzinną firmą z tradycjami, którą 35 lat temu założyli nasi rodzice, z dumą kontynuujemy rodzinną tradycję sprzedaży pasmanterii i dodatków krawieckich.
Zapewniamy fachową obsługę z wykwalifikowaną, doświadczoną i profesjonalną załogą #teamustefana. Nasza kadra zna się na rzeczy od podszewki, to świetni doradcy i niezawodni specjaliści. Nasze doświadczenie pozwala nam zachować standardy obsługi na najwyższym poziomie.
Wkładamy w naszą pracę serce, kroimy dla Ciebie ofertę na miarę, dopinamy wszystko na ostatni guzik by sprostać Twoim oczekiwaniom. 

Zapraszamy do współpracy

In essence, Anushree Multi Trades Pvt Ltd is more than just an apparel startup; it is a forward-thinking enterprise poised for substantial growth in a competitive industry landscape.

Rooted in a deep appreciation for craftsmanship, every pair of jeans reflects our commitment to quality, individuality, and timeless style.

Sustainability is at the heart of what we do—it’s not just a trend, but a core commitment.

From choosing Eco-friendly materials to reducing waste, we’re dedicated to making a positive impact on the planet.

Our journey focuses on responsibility and innovation in every pair of jeans we create.

SAC & Co is more than just a brand—it’s a way of life.

We embrace authenticity, individuality, and the confidence that comes with wearing timeless denim, proudly made in Greece. Every collection is 100% crafted in Greece, reflecting our dedication to quality and style.

Step into SAC & Co’s world, where each pair of jeans becomes a part of your unique fashion story.

Let your style speak for itself.

VISIÓN:

NUESTRA FILOSOFIA:
Por medio de todos nuestros productos buscamos trasmitir que no existen las cosas perfectas y que cada quien tiene tu definición de perfecto,  las cosas perfectas no son necesariamente las que la sociedad te indica que lo son, si no las que cumple con las cualidades o necesidades según tu propio criterio, consideramos que perfecto no tiene un significado, no significa ser alguna clase social o cualquier etiqueta, si no tus valores. Todos somos perfectos en nuestra propia manera, muchas personas aseguran que la definición de la palabra perfecto es ser exitoso, sin embargo creemos que la palabra perfecto no tiene una definición absoluta.

Crear una gran familia considerando a nuestros, clientes, colaboradores y proveedores. Todas nuestras actividades buscan generar bienestar social, fomentar el valor y la satisfacción de nuestros clientes. Creamos relaciones basadas en respeto, confianza, honestidad, lealtad y compromiso.

Name: Capriccio di Moda S.r.l.
Description:
Nata nel 1999, Capriccio di Moda riesce in pochi anni ad affermarsi a livello internazionale nella distribuzione di abbigliamento firmato a stock.

Situata a Firenze, l’azienda si distingue per la sua attenta cura nella selezione dei migliori stock di abbigliamento uomo donna, ma anche accessori e pelletteria delle più esclusive griffes italiane ed internazionali acquistando stock dalle principali case di moda e dai negozi più prestigiosi.

Grazie alla nostra professionalità e competenza l’azienda si è stabilita saldamente sul mercato nazionale ed internazionale, diventando in pochi anni leader nel settore della distribuzione abbigliamento a stock: cordialità, professionalità e risparmio sono le chiavi del nostro successo.

Vantiamo una superficie di circa 1.200 mq. tra showroom e magazzino, offrendo ai nostri clienti un’ampia scelta grazie ad uno spazioso allestimento di oltre 22.000 capi sempre visionabili.

Trasparenza e Massima Cura del Cliente
La nostra meticolosa attenzione nello scegliere solo il meglio ci ha portato negli anni a crescere ed instaurare un rapporto di fiducia e di trasparenza con i nostri clienti, che assistiamo attentamente in tutte le loro esigenze e richieste. Nostro punto di forza è sicuramente la tempestività nella risposta e la cordialità dimostrata, offrendo sempre grande cortesia e professionalità. Siamo sempre al fianco dei nostri clienti, sui Social, via e-mail, telefono ma anche via WhatsApp.

Nessun Quantitativo Minimo di Acquisto
Amiamo il nostro lavoro e cerchiamo di svolgerlo sempre offrendo il massimo vantaggio ai nostri clienti, per questo a Capriccio di Moda la vendita della merce avviene senza alcun vincolo di acquisto o di quantitativo minimo. La vendita a stock di abbigliamento senza obbligo di quantità offre ai nostri clienti il grande vantaggio di poter selezionare esclusivamente i prodotti di loro interesse.

I Migliori Stock Grandi Firme: lavoriamo solo brand ed eccellenze

Name: Nitzsche Group
Description:
Die Nitzsche Group steht seit mehr als zwei Jahrhunderten für eine einzigartige Verbindung aus Qualität, Innovation und Nachhaltigkeit in der Modebranche. Unter unserem Leitsatz „WE CREATE TOGETHER“ entwickeln wir maßgeschneiderte Kollektionen, die nicht nur durch ihre Ästhetik überzeugen, sondern auch höchste soziale und ethische Standards entlang der gesamten Lieferkette erfüllen.

Ihr zuverlässiger Partner im B2B-Segment Als etablierter Experte im B2B-Bereich bieten wir umfassende Lösungen für namhafte Marken und aufstrebende Labels. Unser Portfolio reicht von hochwertigen Basic-Artikeln bis hin zu exklusiven Premium-Kollektionen und umfasst:

· Unsere Handelsmarke „Nitzsche“
· Produktentwicklung für Ihre Marke
· Workwear und Corporate Fashion
· Merchandising-Produkte

Qualität, Kreativität und Nachhaltigkeit im Fokus Bei der Nitzsche Group stehen höchste Ansprüche an Qualität und Design im Mittelpunkt. Unser engagiertes Team arbeitet eng mit Ihnen zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass jedes Produkt Ihre Erwartungen übertrifft. Jährlich kreieren wir vielseitige Kollektionen für Damen, Herren und Kinder und haben bereits über 350 internationale Kunden betreut.

Globale Reichweite Mit einer Präsenz in mehr als 15 Ländern bieten wir umfassende Dienstleistungen, von internationaler Logistik bis hin zur Qualitätskontrolle durch internationale Prüfinstitute. Unser modernes Logistiksystem garantiert zuverlässige und termingerechte Lieferungen.

Von der Vision zur Realität Haben Sie eine klare Vorstellung von einem individuellen Accessoire? Wir begleiten Sie durch den gesamten Prozess – von der professionellen Designentwicklung bis zur pünktlichen Auslieferung. Mit der Nitzsche Group als Partner wird Ihre Vision Wirklichkeit.

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Mode neu definieren. Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihre Marke mit unseren Lösungen zu bereichern.

Name: Leluc Lingerie
Description:
A Leluc lingerie é uma empresa familiar, com o propósito de celebrar a beleza do corpo feminino, no ano de 2010 nasceu a Leluc Lingerie.

Fundada com o compromisso inabalável com a qualidade, priorizamos o desenvolvimento e execução de produtos que atendem aos mais altos padrões do mercado. Com uma equipe dedicada e apaixonada pelo que faz, cada peça que sai das nossas instalações é um testemunho do nosso compromisso com a perfeição e a durabilidade.

Nosso parque fabril conta com mil metros quadrados, concentrando as áreas de Desenvolvimento, Produção, Estoque e Expedição, funcionando em 100% da sua capacidade. O aprimoramento contínuo e o investimento em tecnologia e treinamento de nossos profissionais são fatores essenciais da nossa estrutura, para potencializar cada dia mais a produção e entregar os melhores produtos para nossos clientes.

Com mais de 100 Colaboradores produzimos mais de 70.000 peças por mês, que atende desde as grandes redes de lojas ao consumidor final. Hoje possuímos mais de 300 modelos de peças, distribuídos entre as linhas sensual, romântica, conforto, linha noite e linha básica, que ficam à disposição dos nossos clientes de private label, e uma variedade de 150 modelos a pronta entrega, disponíveis em nossas 2 lojas físicas e em nosso E-commerce.

Cada linha que projetamos tem o intuito de valorizar e realçar a feminilidade única de cada mulher. Acreditamos que a autoestima começa ao vestir uma lingerie que te deixa confortável e que realça sua beleza.

Por isso, nossa missão é proporcionar lingeries que vão além de só vestir bem, mas também elevar a autoconfiança de quem veste.

Essa é a nossa identidade: cada designer, cada detalhe, cada costura é feita com amor e dedicação, refletindo o nosso compromisso contínuo em produzir autoestima.

Name: LBR LUBER
Description:
Comercializadora de Confecciones LUBER SAS Inició actividades en el año 1968 con un equipo de máquinas para “este” la confección del primer vestido, con su planta de producción, un pequeño grupo de trabajadores y directivos. Con un crecimiento constante desde su nacimiento, la planta de producción y el número de empleados operativos y administrativos ha crecido a medida que el ritmo del mercado aumentaba en la aceptación de la marca.

Durante más de 45 años de labores ininterrumpidas nuestra compañía ha orientado todo su esfuerzo al diseño, desarrollo de confección formal y casual de prendas de vestir, Actualmente contamos con una infraestructura propia, nuestros productos son confeccionados con telas de la mejor calidad del país obteniendo la altura de las más grandes empresas del sector de nuestro país.

El activo más importante de esta organización es y será el nuestro capital humano, adquiriendo a través del tiempo y en la cual soportamos todos nuestros desarrollos de diseño. Estas personas, forman parte de un grupo humano capacitado y motivado, utilizando máquinas e Insumos que permiten asegurar la calidad de los procesos de producción y del producto final.

La empresa ha enfocado durante años sus esfuerzos para brindar al trabajador seguridad y confianza en el desempeño diario de sus labores, manteniendo así mismo, un liderazgo en la participación del mercado de las confecciones en Colombia.

En el recorrido de todos estos años hemos logrado convencer a varias generaciones de nuestro compromiso, la seriedad y el «hacer bien las cosas», pretendemos seguir reforzando con el continuo mejoramiento y actualización de nuestros procesos para mantener su preferencia, y con los firmes objetivos de expandir nuestros esfuerzos a otros países, partiendo de la confianza en el buen trabajo que hasta ahora hemos desarrollado con toda la familia Comercializadora de Confecciones LUBER SAS.

Name: IDYL
Description:
İstanbul’un tarihî dokusuyla modern yaşamın birleştiği noktada doğan IDYL, geleneksel değerlerle yenilikçiliği harmanlayan bir tekstil markası olarak hayata geçti. 
IDYL, hem şehrin zengin kültürel mirasından esinlenmiş hem de modern yaşamın ihtiyaçlarına uygun tasarımlar sunan bir markadır. Her bir ürün, İstanbul’un çarşılarından esen rüzgarla, Boğaz'ın serin sularının ilhamıyla dokunmuştur. Kaliteli kumaşları ve özenli işçiliğiyle IDYL, stil sahibi kadınların ilk tercihi olmayı hedeflemektedir.
Toptan satış stratejisiyle tekstil sektöründe adından söz ettiren IDYL, mağazaların ve butiklerin raflarını süsleyen benzersiz koleksiyonlarıyla fark yaratmaktadır. İstanbul’un canlı sokaklarından dünyaya açılan IDYL, her kadın için şıklığı ve zarafeti ulaşılabilir kılmayı misyon edinmiştir.
Başarı dolu yolculuğumuzda, IDYL ailesi olarak her zaman kaliteyi, estetiği ve müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutuyoruz. Gücümüzü İstanbul’un tarihinden, enerjimizi ise işimize olan tutkumuzdan alıyoruz. IDYL, her anın bir hikayesi olduğunu ve her hikayenin bizimle daha da güzel olduğunu biliyor.

Name: MerchStores
Description:
About MerchStores

Our mission is to help brands, talent, and companies create merch with meaning and stories with style. We turn ideas into thoughtful products that move through culture — onstage, online, and beyond — connecting with audiences in ways that last longer than the moment. From one-off drops to global programs, we build merchandise worth wearing, gifting, and keeping.

MerchStores is a full-stack merchandise partner built for today’s culture economy. With nearly two decades of experience in marketing, eCommerce, and merchandise strategy, we help partners turn ideas into products people actually want — assortments designed around fandoms, moments, and what makes a brand unforgettable. From limited drops to large-scale supply chains, we consult, build, and execute programs that bring stories to life.

Our Capabilities

• Talent & Tours: From arena stages to intimate venues, we turn live moments into lasting connections with tour drops and artist collaborations.
• Brands & DTC: Shopify Plus builds, full eCommerce operations, and story-driven assortments that bring brand stories to fans.
• Corporate & Hospitality: Gifting, employee culture, and client experiences powered by production and fulfillment for partners like Postal, FanDuel, Cisco, and Uber.
• Wholesale & Marketplaces: Scale at speed through Walmart, Target, Urban Outfitters, Shein, and beyond.

MerchStores isn’t just about products — it’s about cultural impact. We help partners make a statement that lasts.
-------------
About HYPER iCONiC

As part of the MerchStores family, HYPER iCONiC is our own retail brand for pop culture — a destination for fans of music, TV, movies, and cult icons. From legendary artists to unforgettable franchises, HYPER iCONiC delivers tees, hoodies, and lifestyle goods designed to celebrate the moments and icons that move us. It’s where merch becomes fashion, nostalgia meets the now, and being a fan is always in style.

Entregar ao mercado um produto com qualidade, estilo e conforto; agregando crescimento sustentável ao negócio e gerando oportunidades para nossos clientes, parceiros e colaboradores.

VISÃO
Ser a marca mais desejada em moda praia e fitness no Brasil, reconhecida por oferecer produtos de alta qualidade e design inovador, que promovam conforto, estilo e sustentabilidade para mulheres e suas famílias.

My name is TABISH JAVED  with TEAM TORO is to see if we can help your team and coaching staff with uniforms, polos, jackets ,jerseys,soccer uniforms, football,American Footbal Uniforms, Coach Polos, shirts,basketball uniforms,cycling wears,gym wears  or promotional shirts for all your families. I know your team is well established, and most likely has a company that you have used in the past, but I wanted to reach out to you and let you know that Brand U is here and available to you for all of your team apparel needs.
 
TEAM TORO carries all of the top names in apparel like., as well as budget friendly brands to fit your needs. We are located locally in Campbell, CA and have a fast 5-6 day turnaround with competitive pricing. So whenever you are ready please give Brand U a try the next time you need to order apparel.
 
Why Are Team Uniforms So Important?
 
•	Identity:  The most fundamental feature of a team uniform, and arguably the primary reason early sports teams adopted them in the first place, is to visually distinguish between competing teams and identify players during the game.  During a soccer game, for instance, the ball might be moving pretty fast. If you're on the field, you need to know which players to pass to and which to keep the ball away from. Contrasting team uniforms help you stay aware of what is going on around you. For the fans, uniforms help you root for the home team and keep track of the games progress. But that’s not the only type of identity uniforms help promote on the field.
 
•	Unity: When you are all wearing the same cap and the same team colors, you truly feel like a part of the group. A uniform fosters team unity, which in turn can keep players motivated to succeed. It also creates solidarity between players and fans. Having a strong fan base is essential to a teams morale, motivating players even further.

Name: Original Minds Apparel AB - Clothing and designs for every mind
Description:
Original Minds Apparel är inte bara ett klädmärke – det är ett hjärteprojekt. Vi skapar kläder med omtanke för personer med neuropsykiatriska funktionsvariationer (NPF) såsom Autism, ADHD, OCD och liknande diagnoser. Vårt mål är att göra vardagen lite mjukare, mer funktionell och samtidigt öka förståelsen och acceptansen för NPF i samhället.
Företaget grundades av paret Milou och Henric Froh, föräldrar till Sickan, som har Autism. Nyligen fick teamet sällskap av Kim Hammar och Jennifer Tegnelund, som också är föräldrar till Frank, med samma diagnos. Tillsammans bygger vi Original Minds Apparel på vår gemensamma erfarenhet, passion och kärlek – och en vilja att göra skillnad.
Kläder med omtanke – i varje söm
Alla våra plagg är designade med NPF i åtanke. Det betyder bland annat att vi fokuserar på:
•	Material som är mjuka, hållbara och behagliga mot huden
•	Passform utan störande sömmar eller lappar
•	Design som både känns trygg och tilltalande för olika sinnesintryck
Vi använder endast certifierade material – Organic 100 (100% ekologisk bomull) och återvunnen polyester – för att säkerställa både komfort och hållbarhet. För oss går omtanke om individen hand i hand med omsorg om planeten.
Tillsammans gör vi skillnad
Original Minds Apparel tror på att ge tillbaka. Därför samarbetar vi gärna med och stödjer föreningar och organisationer som driver utveckling, kunskap och förändring inom NPF-området. Det är vår övertygelse att alla, oavsett funktionsvariation, har rätt till ett liv med värdighet, trygghet och möjlighet att uttrycka sin originalitet.
Vi hoppas att du hittar något hos oss som passar just dig eller någon du bryr dig om. Tillsammans kan vi skapa en mjukare värld – en tröja, ett steg och en förståelse i taget.
 Designat med omtanke
 Tillverkat med ansvar
 Drivet av erfarenhet

Description:
Prissile – Irish Wholesale Clothing Supplier

Prissile is a Dublin-based wholesale clothing supplier serving schools, universities, and businesses across Ireland. We specialise in school uniforms, custom-printed t-shirts and hoodies, and branded merchandise.

For Schools:
We work with Irish schools as an approved alternate uniform supplier. Schools approve us once through their Board of Management then parents order directly from our online shop. There's no financial or administrative involvement for the school. We match existing uniform specifications exactly, including colours and crests, and provide all compliance documentation before supply begins.

For Universities & Societies
We supply custom-printed t-shirts, hoodies, and merchandise for student societies, sports clubs, and university events. Whether it's Holi festival gear, RAG week merchandise, or society hoodies, we handle design, printing, and delivery.

For Businesses
From branded workwear to corporate merchandise and event apparel, we provide quality clothing with your logo at competitive wholesale prices.

Why Prissile?

Irish-registered company (CRO 781714)
Competitive wholesale pricing
Quality products with agreed delivery timelines
Direct ordering model, we handle everything
Responsive support within 24 hours
Based in Dublin, we're committed to providing quality clothing at fair prices while making the ordering process simple for schools, organisations, and businesses.

Name: Fit USA Manufacturing
Description:
Fit USA Manufacturing was founded in1996 in Ormond Beach, FL, under the name Fabra USA specializing in sublimated athletic apparel. 

In 2016, under new ownership, we operated briefly as Fabrox. However, our commitment to serving our customers with American-made excellence led us to a significant rebranding effort. In February 2017, we proudly emerged as Fit USA Manufacturing.

Fit USA Manufacturing stands as a privately held LLC, proudly owned by a disabled veteran and a female executive. Our journey has been one of evolution, rooted in our dedication to quality and innovation.

Today, Fit USA Manufacturing is a full-package apparel production company providing apparel to the largest entertainment company globally, as well as for multiple well known private labels. Our expertise spans various domains, including sublimation, cut/sew operations, pattern making and grading, fabric sourcing, warehousing, and logistics.

We invite you to experience the Fit USA difference. Let us bring your next project to life with precision, craftsmanship, and a touch of American pride. Call Fit USA Manufacturing today at 877-715-6886 and entrust us to be the creators of your vision.

Name: Paquito Pronto Moda

Paquito è un'azienda che dagli anni ‘70 racconta il suo spirito innovativo e dinamico: una realtà Made in Italy che tramanda di generazione in generazione il proprio sapere. Da principio l’azienda produceva sia la donna che l’uomo, poi negli anni si è concentrata sul segmento femminile e su quello che rappresenta il know-how: la maglieria.

Paquito è oggi una realtà ben consolidata nel campo del pronto moda, e oggi è la terza generazione a portare avanti quanto costruito con Riccardo, che ne è divenuto titolare.

Nasce come “ Pronto Moda” ed a questa etichetta vuole appartenere perché è lì che può dare il giusto contributo, da qui la scelta di non presentare collezioni stagionali ma produrre per soddisfare le richieste evitando sovrapproduzioni, mantenendo così un’alta qualità delle materie prime riducendo al minimo l’utilizzo di materiali sintetici e un’ottima velocità di riassortimento dei capi riuscendo così a soddisfare al massimo le richieste del mercato.

Pour anticiper les nouvelles tendances en matière de matériaux et d'accessoires, leur équipe d'approvisionnement assure une veille technologique et participe à tous les salons internationaux.

En tant que partenaire de production à part entière, Cabilux développe et industrialise les designs de leurs clients sur demande. Cela comprend des services tels que la création de patrons, le développement de produits, la gradation des patrons et l'ajustement des tailles.

Created in 1986, Cabilux manufactures and develops medium to high-end daywear and nightwear clothing on the doorstep of Europe for partners seeking optimal service. Its responsiveness and adaptability make it a preferred partner for major European brands. With its 250 versatile employees and 10 production lines, Cabilux has a production capacity of over 3000 pieces per day.
Convinced that the future of textiles lies in offering high-value-added services, Cabilux has established a material sourcing team. To anticipate new material and accessory trends, their sourcing team maintains technological surveillance and attends all international trade shows.
As a full-fledged production partner, Cabilux develops and industrializes their clients' designs upon request. This includes services such as pattern making, product development, pattern grading, and size fitting.

Description:

We embrace innovation in design, production and social responsibility that fulfils a genuine need of our customers. Our aim at PL1 is to foster a positive fashion culture and cultivate strong relationships within the community to ultimately have a positive impact on Plymouth.

Abigail Schaefer and Anna Masclans are the directors and founders of PL1; two fashion designers and educators with 20 years of industry experience together, based in Plymouth. Both have degrees in Fashion Design, whilst Abigail has since completed her MA in ‘Entrepreneurship in Creative Practice’, and Anna completed an MA in ‘Creative Education’ at Arts University Plymouth. They have experience in studio-based careers in Europe and UK, manufacturing expertise and an extensive teaching background on creating and delivering programs for formal and non-formal education.

Name: HERECO
Description:
Reviving traditions of regenerative textile craft

For millennia, the Ukrainian people engaged in regenerative cultivation of hemp and flax textiles, fostering a tradition that endured until the 1970s. This practice involved organic farming methods without machinery, chemicals and electricity and transformation from yarn to fabric occurred through manual weaving on traditional looms. 

HERECO studied and modernised these ancient techniques to establish Europe’s first fair trade, regenerative textile production from seed to final garment.

Name: KAHUNA- OCEAN SOUL
Description:
KAHUNA - OCEAN SOUL incarne l’harmonie entre l’homme et la nature, inspirée par la sérénité de l’océan et la tranquillité des paysages côtiers. Nos vêtements sont une invitation à ralentir, à profiter de chaque instant, et à se reconnecter avec l’essentiel. Avec des matériaux naturels et un design épuré, chaque pièce est pensée pour ceux qui aspirent à une vie simple, douce, et respectueuse de l’environnement.

Conscients de la beauté fragile de notre planète, nous nous engageons à minimiser notre empreinte écologique. Chaque vêtement KAHUNA - OCEAN SOUL est fabriqué de manière responsable, en privilégiant des procédés durables et des matériaux respectueux de l’environnement. Que vous soyez allongé sur les plages dorées de Maui, bercé par les vagues tranquilles de Bali, ou en quête d’une évasion dans les criques cachées de Santorin, nous vous accompagnons dans votre quête de bien-être et de relaxation, tout en prenant soin de préserver les merveilles naturelles qui nous inspirent.

Nos collections évoquent l’esprit farniente, une invitation à se détendre et à savourer la beauté sauvage de la nature, dans un style à la fois décontracté et élégant. Imprégnées de l’essence des lieux emblématiques du monde, comme les côtes hawaïennes ou les plages ensoleillées d’Ibiza, chaque pièce reflète notre engagement à protéger ces environnements précieux tout en vous offrant confort et style.

Plongez dans l’univers KAHUNA, où la liberté, la douceur de vivre et l’amour de l’océan fusionnent avec une conscience environnementale pour créer des vêtements à la fois beaux et responsables.

---

 Our D2C Promise

We are redefining what it means to be direct-to-consumer. For us, it’s not about dropshipping or trendy, high-margin products. It's about bringing the factory closer to you.

Our promise is to deliver:
*   **Honest, Wholesale Pricing:** Access high-quality, essential goods directly from the source without inflated costs.
*   **Product Excellence:** We listen to our customers and use your feedback to continuously improve our apparel.
*   **No Gimmicks:** We believe in the quality of our products, not in "buy one, get one free" offers or hiding shipping costs. Just premium apparel, priced fairly.

Whether you are a small decorator, a growing brand, or someone who appreciates quality essentials, Milltex Blanks is your source for apparel that’s built to last and designed to inspire.

Established in 1975 by Mr. Lahlou, a textile engineer, MODATRIC specialized in heavy knitwear and owed its initial success to wholesale until 1980.
The emergence of specialized chains and the boom of mail-order sales guide the company towards a new manufacturing strategy on a larger scale, and give it a more industrial dimension in the production of its products.
Our clients now include NAF NAF, GERARD DAREL, BLANCHE PORTE, QUELLE, 3 SUISSES, and LA REDOUTE.

Description:
M. Francky Naccache, fort de 15 années d'expérience dans le secteur du licensing et de la fabrication, a créé en 2020 DS Consulting Corporate, une agence française spécialisée dans le licensing international.

Chez DS Consulting Corporate, nous ne sommes pas simplement un prestataire de services, mais plutôt un véritable partenaire. Notre objectif est de restaurer l'image de marque de nos clients en prenant en charge le développement et la commercialisation de leurs produits sous licence. Pour cela, nous mettons en œuvre un savoir-faire pointu, un suivi permanent et une connaissance approfondie des marchés internationaux. Nos procédures de prospection et de gestion des licenciés garantissent à nos clients un développement serein.

Chaque pôle licence de notre agence dispose d'une équipe dédiée composée de stylistes expérimentés, qui travaillent en étroite collaboration avec la marque et les tendances actuelles. Nos stylistes s'appuient sur leur savoir-faire, ainsi que sur les attitudes et les besoins du marché, pour développer des collections de produits de qualité, accessibles au grand public et en phase avec les tendances actuelles.

Parce qu'une marque ne se résume pas seulement à une histoire, mais aussi à un savoir-faire, nous mettons tout en œuvre pour offrir à nos clients un service complet et professionnel. Chez DS Consulting Corporate, nous sommes fiers de notre expertise dans le domaine du licensing international et de notre engagement envers nos clients pour les aider à réussir sur le marché mondial.

Notre mission :
Chez Denimas, notre mission est de donner du pouvoir à l'industrie de la mode et de l'habillement en fournissant des tissus de qualité supérieure et un service inégalé. Nous nous efforçons d'être le partenaire de choix pour les designers, les fabricants et les détaillants, en favorisant la créativité et l'innovation grâce à notre vaste offre de textiles.

Notre vision :
Nous envisageons un avenir où Denimas est synonyme de qualité et de fiabilité dans l'industrie textile. Notre objectif est d'élargir continuellement notre gamme de produits et de renforcer nos relations avec nos clients, contribuant à la croissance et au succès du secteur de la mode au Maroc et au-delà.

Valeurs fondamentales :
- Qualité : Nous nous engageons à fournir des tissus de la plus haute qualité à nos clients.
- Orientation client : Les besoins de nos clients sont au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons.
- Intégrité : Nous menons nos affaires avec honnêteté et transparence.
- Innovation : Nous recherchons continuellement de nouvelles et meilleures façons de servir nos clients.
- Durabilité : Nous nous engageons à adopter des pratiques durables dans nos approvisionnements et nos opérations.

Name: Copenhagen Colors Organics
Description:
Copenhagen Colors designs and produces high quality textiles, accessories and interiors for children aged 0-12 years. We create clean products - all based on a sustainable mindset. We believe that the world will be cleaner and better with controlled production. Therefore, high safety requirements are an essential part of Copenhagen Colors, and we strive to ensure that all our products are eco-labeled. As Company we are GOTS Certified.

Copenhagen Colors is a playful and diverse design universe. Together with the parents, we want to stimulate children's unspoiled, curious, and creative minds from the very beginning of their lives. Our design is inspired by the world we live in. An illustrative storytelling in an infinite color universe that brings all the senses into play. And which, through play and learning, is developing for both a baby and a child. We are based on colors, functionality and freedom of movement. It is essential for us that our clothes are not only lovely to look at with adult eyes, but are also created for play by the child. And that our accessories and interior are both functional and can pique curiosity.

Copenhagen Colors wants to celebrate the diversity of this wonderful world.
We believe that the acceptance of our diversity can be shaped through play and learning right from childhood. We want that through our universe we can influence the next generations with a collective awareness of this.
We make an effort and put our heart into everything we do - from design to production and distribution.

Name: Kleiber + Co. GmbH
Description:
Die Kleiber + Co. GmbH ist Ihr Partner für praktische Kurzwaren und kreatives Handarbeiten. Als mittelständisches Unternehmen im Herzen des Allgäus denken und handeln wir international. Durch innovative Ideen, langjährige Erfahrung, verantwortungsvolle Geschäftspolitik und das Know-how des Kleiber Teams ist der Name Kleiber nicht nur in Deutschland, sondern auch in Europa bekannt.

Kurzwaren und Handarbeitsbedarf: Unser Qualitätssortiment umfasst zeitsparende Kurzwaren, scharf geschliffene Scheren, attraktive Filz-Bastelsets sowie ideale Lösungen für Wäschepflege und Aufbewahrung. Unsere Produkte machen Basteln, Nähen und Handarbeiten zum Erlebnis für Jung und Alt.

Nachhaltigkeit: Als Traditionsunternehmen setzen wir auf gleichbleibend hohe Qualität und Produktionssicherheit und sehen uns verpflichtet, auch im Kurzwarenmarkt ökologische Nachhaltigkeit groß zu schreiben. Wir produzieren so umweltschonend wie möglich und garantieren hochwertige, innovative und geprüfte Produkte.

Service: Unsere qualifizierten Teams sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Bedürfnisse stets erfüllt werden. Wir arbeiten erfolgreich mit renommierten Prüfinstituten zusammen, um höchste Standards zu gewährleisten. Unsere langjährigen internationalen Geschäftsbeziehungen und faire Arbeitsbedingungen in unseren Produktionsstätten sind weitere Garanten für unseren hohen Qualitätsstandard.

Karriere: Werden Sie Teil unseres erfolgreichen Teams! Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungschancen in den Bereichen der Fach- und Führungskarriere. Entdecken Sie Ihre Möglichkeiten bei der Kleiber + Co. GmbH und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft der Handarbeitsbranche.

Wir bei Kleiber schätzen unsere Mitarbeiter, Kunden und Produzenten. Viele unserer Mitarbeiter verbringen ihr gesamtes Berufsleben in unserer Firma, und unsere Kunden beliefern wir seit Jahrzehnten. Dies ist der Garant für unseren hohen Qualitätsstandard.

Lassen Sie sich von der Vielfalt und den Neuheiten unserer Kleiber Kurzwaren-Welt begeistern.

Name: JAWD Lifestyles LLP
Description:
JAWD Lifestyles LLP is a B2B-focused textile manufacturing and procurement company delivering comprehensive solutions across uniforms, workwear, home textiles, toiletry essentials, and promotional fabric-based materials. We serve as a reliable partner for corporates, institutions, retail chains, hospitality groups, and healthcare facilities seeking both standardized and customized textile products with consistent quality and professional execution.

Our workwear and uniform division caters to the diverse needs of industries including corporate offices, factories, hospitals, restaurants, retail stores, schools, and security agencies. We offer tailored solutions for a wide range of garments such as shirts, trousers, coats, scrubs, aprons, chefwear, and industrial safety uniforms—each designed for functionality, comfort, and brand representation.

In the home textile category, we manufacture and supply coordinated products such as bed sheets, pillow covers, cushion covers, duvet covers, bed runners, and curtains that meet the aesthetic and operational standards of hotels, hospitals, service apartments, and institutional accommodations.

Our toiletry line includes bathrobes, towels, hand napkins, and washcloths manufactured with a focus on absorbency, durability, and softness—ideal for hospitality and healthcare environments.

Additionally, we offer a versatile range of marketing and promotional materials made from jute, cotton, canvas, and other sustainable fabrics. This includes customized gift bags, shopping totes, event giveaways, and corporate merchandise, enabling businesses to align brand visibility with eco-conscious values.

With robust sourcing capabilities, scalable manufacturing infrastructure, and a client-centric approach, JAWD Lifestyles LLP ensures quality, customization, and timely fulfillment. We stand as a dependable partner in the textile value chain—built for institutions that value professionalism, consistency, and efficiency.

Most of our blank hats have options for rope embellishments or under-the-bill patterns to really help your personal design stand out in the crowd. 

Our premium blank hats are a door to unleashing your creativity. That’s why we chose to carry mostly hats with vibrant color combinations and stand-out design features... like our hidden STASH POCKET, which is included in most of our hats!

Whether you need swag for a conference, items for a school fundraiser, or matching hats for your community sports league, we have the perfect blank hat style made from high-quality, durable, water- and sweat-resistant materials to help you perform well even in the most demanding conditions (such as a mid-summer golf tournament).

Name: Indulaboral
Description:
Somos una empresa de indumentaria laboral. Proporcionamos prendas de alta calidad que garantizan diseño, protección y durabilidad. Brindamos asesoramiento personalizado adaptando cada uniforme a la imágen corportativa y necesidad de cada empresa/cliente. En un mundo laboral cada vez más exigente, entendemos la importancia de contar con
ropa adecuada para cada tipo de trabajo. Por ello, nos especializamos en la fabricación y distribución de indumentaria laboral personalizada para diversos
sectores, como la construcción, seguridad, la industria, la salud, la hostelería y muchos otros.
Nos encargamos de diseñar y confeccionar cada prenda teniendo en cuenta las especificaciones de cada cliente. Trabajamos con los mejores materiales del mercado, garantizando así la resistencia, protección y comodidad que nuestros clientes merecen.
En nuestra empresa, la confianza, la calidad y la seguridad son prioridades fundamentales. Todas nuestras prendas cumplen con las normativas vigentes, asegurando así la protección de los trabajadores en cada labor que desempeñan.
Nos comprometemos con el éxito de nuestros clientes y buscamos siempre ser su aliado confiable en cuanto a indumentaria laboral se refiere. Esperamos poder acompañarlos en su camino hacia un entorno laboral más seguro, cómodo y eficiente.
Gracias por elegirnos como su proveedor de indumentaria laboral!
