Name: Arimar Perú
Description:
ARIMAR es una marca de pijamas de algodón pima creada para quienes valoran la comodidad, la calidad y el diseño. Nacimos en 2022 con un propósito claro: ofrecer prendas suaves, duraderas y hechas con dedicación, combinando tendencias actuales con la artesanía textil peruana.

Cada una de nuestras prendas está confeccionada con algodón pima 100 %, reconocido mundialmente por su suavidad, resistencia y frescura. Diseñamos colecciones pensadas para acompañar los momentos más íntimos del día: descanso, autocuidado y conexión personal. Nos inspira crear piezas que transmitan bienestar, estilo y una experiencia auténtica de confort.

Somos una marca liderada por Marivel Perea y Ariana Serrano, madre e hija que han unido talento, sensibilidad por la moda y conocimiento del sector textil para construir una propuesta que prioriza el detalle y la satisfacción de cada cliente. Nuestro trabajo integra diseño, selección de telas, control de calidad y gestión de marca, cuidando todo el proceso desde la idea hasta la entrega final.

En ARIMAR creemos en la importancia de producir con cariño y responsabilidad. Por eso, impulsamos una confección cuidadosa, respetando los tiempos del proceso y manteniendo un estándar de excelencia en cada prenda. Nuestra presencia en redes sociales refleja nuestro compromiso con una comunidad que busca productos auténticos, confiables y con un toque humano.

Hoy seguimos creciendo, llegando a nuevos clientes en Perú y expandiendo nuestros modelos hacia distintos estilos y temporadas. Nuestro objetivo es que cada persona que usa ARIMAR sienta no solo comodidad, sino también una conexión especial con una marca familiar que diseña desde el corazón.

Name: JR Apparel & Co.
Description:
Introducing JR Apparel & Co. - your go-to source for expressive clothing that promotes wellness and addiction awareness for both you and your furry friends!  

Hi, I'm Jackie Holmberg, owner of JR Apparel & Co. We are a retail and wholesale clothing company that's dedicated to providing Canadians with clothing that makes a statement. We believe that fashion is a powerful way to express oneself, and we want to empower people to wear clothing that represents their values and passions.   

At JR Apparel & Co., we offer a wide range of clothing options that are perfect for retailers looking to stock their shelves with unique and meaningful apparel. Our collections include t-shirts, hoodies, and accessories that are all designed with wellness and addiction awareness in mind.   

But what sets us apart is our commitment to pet lovers. We offer a line of pet clothing and accessories that are just as stylish and expressive as our human collections! Whether you're a dog or cat owner, or just love animals in general, our pet clothing is a great way to show your support for important causes while keeping your furry friend looking cute and stylish.   

We know that sometimes you just can't find the perfect clothing item for yourself or your pet. That's why we're here to create custom clothing with expressions that are meaningful to you. When you don't have the words, let us create them for you on a shirt or accessory that you can wear or give as a gift.   

At JR Apparel & Co., we believe in giving back to the community. A portion of our profits goes to support mental health and addiction charities, so when you shop with us, you're not just getting great clothing, you're also making a positive impact on society.

Remember, at JR Apparel & Co., we're not just creating clothes - we're creating a movement.

Name: BAREL FRANCE
Description:
Fabricant/Importateur de vêtements pour HOMME, doté d’une expérience professionnelle depuis 1983 avec la Grande Distribution, la société BAREL FRANCE a su tisser, au fil des ans, des liens solides et durables avec ses partenaires de la Grande Distribution, sur la France comme sur plusieurs pays européens.

BAREL FRANCE est tout particulièrement spécialisée dans la production de chemises (ville, détente, casual, etc…), mais commercialise également des produits connexes comme les tee-shirts, les polos, les sweats, les articles polaires, les bermudas, les shorts de bain, les accessoires, entre autres produits. 
Elle a l’avantage de proposer ses propres productions disponibles sur stock, permettant de satisfaire tout besoin ponctuel et d’adapter les livraisons aux souhaits du client.

Le socle de son activité repose sur ses collections « long terme » qui permettent de réaliser les produits spécifiques sélectionnés par ses clients, parmi ses collections. Toute production est donc envisageable selon des modalités nécessaires à la fabrication des produits. De plus, BAREL FRANCE dispose d’un bureau de style en interne où sont créées et développées toutes les collections. La société accorde une grande importance à mettre en valeur, à la fois la créativité, l’originalité et l’esthétique de ses produits, pour répondre au plus juste à vos attentes.

Bien que les acteurs de la Grande Distribution aient mis en place depuis de longues années leurs propres bureaux d’achats et d’approvisionnement en Asie, BAREL FRANCE a toujours apporté et continue d’apporter, l’actualisation en complément de leurs propres collections du long terme, grâce à la création remarquable et au rapport qualité/prix très appréciable qui qualifient ses collections.

Pour résumer, si vous êtes à la recherche de vêtement de qualité en gros, BAREL FRANCE est une adresse incontournable.

Pour plus d'information nous vous prions de nous contacter sur l'adresse e-mail suivante : commercial1@barelfrance.com

We envision DenHawk as a pioneer in the apparel industry, providing eco-friendly clothing options. Our goal is to become a trusted destination for stylish denim, cotton pants, and knitwear, contributing to a sustainable future.

Mission:
At DenHawk, our mission is to create a positive impact through ethically sourced and durable garments. We prioritize sustainability throughout our supply chain, from sourcing materials to manufacturing processes.

Product Offering:
DenHawk offers a curated selection of denim jeans, cotton pants, and knitwear, reflecting the latest trends while maintaining high quality. Our focus is on providing fashionable, long-lasting clothing options.

Manufacturing Opportunities:
In addition to retail and wholesale, DenHawk offers manufacturing for custom apparel exclusively for wholesale clients. We collaborate closely to meet their unique needs with sustainable manufacturing practices.

Sustainability Commitment:
DenHawk is deeply committed to eco-conscious practices. We source organic and recycled fabrics and employ energy-efficient technologies. We prioritize waste reduction and safe working conditions for our employees.

Export Leftover and Brands for Less:
We also offer export leftover and branded products at wholesale and retail prices. Under the slogan "Brands for Less," customers can access high-quality products from renowned brands at affordable prices.

Name: Pasamanería S.A.
Description:
Fundada en 1935, Pasamanería S.A. es una de las empresas más emblemáticas de la industria textil ecuatoriana. Lo que comenzó como una pequeña fábrica de tejidos y pasamanerías creada por el inmigrante italiano Carlos Tosi Siri, hoy es una organización moderna con más de 550 colaboradores y presencia en 17 ciudades del Ecuador, además de operaciones en Colombia y Perú.
Durante nueve décadas, la empresa ha evolucionado de un taller artesanal a una marca consolidada bajo el nombre PASA, manteniendo un firme compromiso con la innovación, la sostenibilidad y el empleo formal. Su modelo productivo integra el diseño, confección y comercialización de prendas esenciales, atemporales y de alta calidad, con el propósito de reducir el desperdicio textil y promover un consumo responsable.
Con una planta de producción de 35.000 m², Pasamanería fabrica más de 7.000 prendas diarias, y el 70 % de su producción se comercializa directamente al consumidor final a través de 37 tiendas propias y una red de 1.500 clientes minoristas.
Fiel a su filosofía de respeto por la experiencia y el trabajo humano, Pasamanería valora a sus colaboradores y fomenta la igualdad de oportunidades, siendo el 76 % de su equipo mujeres.
A lo largo de su historia, la empresa ha sabido adaptarse a los cambios tecnológicos, económicos y sociales del país, sin perder su esencia: tejer futuro desde la calidad, la innovación y el compromiso social.

Name: Jolie Dame
Description:
Expert en soutien post-opératoire pour les femmes

 À propos de Jolie Dame:
Jolie Dame est une entreprise dédiée à soutenir les femmes dans leur parcours post-opératoire, en particulier celles ayant subi une opération mammaire. Notre mission est d'offrir un soutien innovant et autonome pour faciliter la cicatrisation et le bien-être des femmes dans cette phase délicate de leur vie.

 Notre Solution:
Nous sommes fiers de présenter notre brassière post-opératoire révolutionnaire et innovante, conçue spécifiquement pour répondre aux besoins uniques des femmes après une chirurgie mammaire. Notre brassière offre un confort optimal tout en favorisant une cicatrisation efficace et autonome.

 Notre Engagement:
Chez Jolie Dame, nous nous engageons à fournir un soutien sans faille à nos clientes tout au long de leur rétablissement. Nous croyons fermement en l'importance d'offrir des solutions qui allient confort, esthétique et fonctionnalité pour aider les femmes à retrouver leur confiance et leur bien-être après une opération.

 Rejoignez-nous dans notre mission:
Si vous souhaitez contribuer à améliorer leur expérience post-opératoire, rejoignez-nous chez Jolie Dame! Ensemble, nous pouvons faire une différence significative dans la vie de nombreuses femmes à travers le monde.

Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus sur nos produits et notre mission inspirante!

#PostOp #BienÊtreFéminin #SoutienAprèsChirurgie #InnovationMédicale #JolieDame

Name: Ruck Sox
Description: The Ruck Sox brand was developed after one of our founders suffered from severe blisters during rucking, no matter what he tried. Our Army has been in business for nearly 250 years. Our rifles, uniforms, helmets, plate carriers, and technology has changed dramatically in that time. However, our socks have largely remained unchanged... but we're changing that. Our socks utilize the "miracle fiber", also known as Merino Wool, which moves moisture and thermoregulates body temperature in both hot and cold conditions. Thanks to this, and our 1-year prototyping phase, our socks are precisely engineered to reduce blisters & hotspots while rucking, effectively making rucks suck less. We’re proudly a SOF Disabled Veteran Owned Company knitting all of our socks right here in North Carolina with 100% All-American yarns.

Name: ReSource - Circular Sourcing For Licensed Merchandise
Description:
ReSource is the global circular sourcing network for licensed sports merchandise.

We help professional clubs, brands, retailers, and rights holders turn surplus inventory into second-life opportunities—avoiding landfill, incineration, or destruction.

By connecting qualified buyers with vendors across the sporting world, ReSource enables discreet, sustainability-led liquidation of end-of-season stock, overproduction, and other excess inventory—supporting both environmental and commercial goals.

Our network powers the supply behind global mystery box businesses, discount retailers, and other resale channels—helping protect brand integrity while extending product lifespan.

We believe in a smarter system for sports merchandise—one where every product has a purpose, and no kit goes to waste.

ReThink. ReUse. ReSource.

Name: GW Entretelas e Tecidos
Description:
Somos uma empresa com uma história de sucesso que remonta a 1998, quando um visionário empreendedor da encantadora cidade de Divinópolis decidiu criar algo grande. Durante quatro anos consecutivos, fomos os líderes incontestáveis na nossa região, conquistando o mercado com uma estratégia ousada de preços competitivos, enquanto nosso concorrente local focava na qualidade e na expansão para mercados externos.
Nossa jornada rumo à excelência não parou por aí. Em 2004, demos um passo audacioso ao fundir duas empresas igualmente respeitadas. Uma delas, criada em 1994 por um empreendedor local, já havia percebido a vocação econômica de Divinópolis e a carência de fornecedores de insumos para o setor de confecções. Essa visão inovadora a manteve líder na região por seis anos antes da fusão. Em 1999, a gestão passou para as mãos de dois jovens talentosos, filhos do fundador, que introduziram uma administração inovadora.
A segunda empresa, nascida em 1998 pelas mãos de outro empreendedor local, também teve seu período de liderança na região, mantendo-se no topo por quatro anos. No entanto, sua gestão era mais conservadora.
A fusão em 2004 tinha um objetivo claro: tornar-nos a parceira confiável das indústrias de confecção de vestuário, fornecendo matéria-prima, produtos de composição, embalagens, acessórios e serviços que agregassem valor aos produtos, oferecendo qualidade para proporcionar conforto e bem-estar aos consumidores finais. Isso permitiria aos nossos parceiros confeccionistas conquistar e expandir seu alcance no mercado, aumentando suas receitas.
Com a fusão, adotamos um posicionamento estratégico audacioso, visando dominar o mercado interno de Divinópolis, expandir nossas operações por todo o estado de Minas Gerais e conquistar novos territórios além das fronteiras de Minas. Hoje, somos uma empresa dedicada a impulsionar o sucesso de nossos parceiros, ajudando-os a prosperar em um mercado dinâmico e desafiador.

Name: JPX Casacas Premium
Description:

Fundada en 2015 por Joe Pérez y Paola Saavedra, nuestra empresa suma más de 25 años de experiencia en el rubro textil, con operaciones en el corazón de Gamarra, Lima – Perú.

Nos especializamos en el diseño y producción de casacas que van más allá de una prenda: son un recuerdo, una identidad, un símbolo de unión. Vestimos a estudiantes de 6to grado de primaria, 5to de secundaria, promociones universitarias y también empresas que desean uniformar a su equipo con estilo, calidad y durabilidad.

En JPX apostamos por telas de alto rendimiento como Shark Plus (piel de tiburón), Drill Creditex Premium, Prada Premium, Taslán Gold y modelos Reversibles, combinando lo mejor en tecnología textil con acabados personalizados: bordados, estampados, cortes especiales, capuchas y detalles únicos.

Cada casaca es confeccionada con precisión, cariño y estándares de calidad que aseguran un producto resistente, cómodo y visualmente impactante. Nuestro objetivo es claro: que cada promoción diga con orgullo “esta es mi casaca!”

Atendemos en Lima y enviamos a todo el Perú. Nos diferenciamos por brindar atención personalizada, cumplimiento en los plazos y asesoría en todo el proceso de diseño y producción.

Name: Swift Apparels
Description:
At SwiftApparel, we are a premier B2B supplier specializing in high-quality, custom-branded apparel for businesses, universities, and large-scale events. As supply chain specialists, we eliminate the complexities of bulk ordering by seamlessly connecting manufacturers with clients, ensuring a hassle-free experience from design to delivery. Our focus is on providing exceptional, customized merchandise that truly represents the identity and vision of every organization we serve.

In the past year alone, we have successfully delivered over 20,000 custom t-shirts, polos, and hoodies across India, maintaining a strong reputation for quality, efficiency, and reliability. Our client portfolio includes leading quick commerce brands, top-tier universities, and prestigious events such as TEDx and corporate summits. By streamlining the supply chain and offering tailored solutions, we make bulk apparel ordering effortless and cost-effective for businesses of all sizes.

In the bulk apparel industry, quality and pricing often come at a trade-off—large manufacturers produce premium clothing but seldom cater to small or mid-sized bulk orders, leaving many businesses with limited options. At SwiftApparel, we bridge this gap by leveraging our high-volume production capacity, manufacturing tens of thousands of garments every month. This scale allows us to negotiate the best pricing with manufacturers, enabling us to deliver top-tier apparel at competitive rates without restrictive minimum order requirements. Whether for corporate events, university fests, or brand promotions, we guarantee superior fabric quality, seamless fulfillment, and cost-effective solutions, making custom apparel more accessible than ever.

In the Spotlight Edition, we shine a light on "handmade/made with LOVE" small businesses. Every month, you'll receive a unique item from these exceptional businesses, whether they're local gems or hidden treasures from your area.

Now, let me share a bit about my journey. I'm a dedicated creative entrepreneur with a heart full of love for my family and a strong passion for crafting. My family, including my husband, two boys, and even our lovable Great Dane, mean the world to me. They are my driving force, my "Why."

You'll often find me wearing my heart on my sleeve – quite literally – with tees that express my personality. From "Blessed Mama" to "Let the Shenanigans Begin," my tees reflect who I am. I firmly believe that if words can't capture it, your outfit can!

My creative spirit is a constant companion, whether I'm designing, crafting, or whipping up something delicious in the kitchen. But what truly shapes my perspective is being a mother to two medically complex boys. Their strength reminds me to focus on the joys in life.

Thank you for being a part of the Gabbie Co. community. I'm excited to embark on this journey with all of you. Let's celebrate life, creativity, and connection, one tee shirt at a time. I look forward to creating your tee shirt dreams.


MandieLee

Name: Huaxia hanfu
Description:
Hanfu, also known as the traditional attire of the Han nationality, is a traditional clothing and accessory system that is based on the "Huaxia Han" culture as the background and dominant ideology, centered around the Huaxia etiquette culture. It has a unique Han ethnic style and personality, and is clearly different from other ethnic groups.
The basic styles of Hanfu mainly include upper and lower garment systems, deep garment systems, and clothing and pants systems. Under the basic style, hundreds of styles have been interpreted due to different variations in neckline, sleeve shape, waistband, cutting, and matching methods. 

Hanfu originated from the Yellow Emperor and was prepared by Yao and Shun. It originated from the Huangdi coronal attire and was established during the Zhou Dynasty. Through the Han Dynasty, a complete coronal attire system was formed based on the Four Books and Five Classics. 
The beauty of Hanfu is called “Hua”, and the grandeur of etiquette is the "Xia". "Hua" is a kind of demeanor, a national temperament and spirit. A piece of Hanfu, a piece of faith. Hanfu is one of the quintessence of Chinese culture, and it is a very beautiful garment. Hanfu best reflects the refined and elegant temperament, graceful and elegant demeanor, and beautiful and upright demeanor of the Han people. 

Company Vision
Hangzhou A-One Fish Technology Co., Ltd was established in 2018 and has been focusing on the design and production of children's original Chinese clothing for the past 5 years. The team has put in all their efforts from style selection, fabric selection, sampling, production, quality inspection to shooting. Our young work team is determined to bring carefully crafted products to children around the world. Al Suroor Sewing Equipment LLC offers a comprehensive range of products and services tailored to the needs of the tailoring and fashion industry in the UAE. Here's an overview of their offerings:

Products:
Industrial Sewing Machines
Al Suroor provides a wide variety of high-performance sewing machines designed for different purposes. This includes bar-tacking machines, overlock machines, blindstitch machines, and more. Notable Brands include:
JACK – Known for its advanced digital lockstitch, overlock, and interlock machines, offering features like automatic thread trimming, fabric thickness detection, and digital stitch adjustment.
Typical – Offers overlock, blindstitch, and cylinder-bed machines, suitable for both light and heavy-duty fabrics.
Tailleur – Specializes in button-holing and bar-tacking machines, designed for reinforced stitching in garments like suits and workwear
Home Sewing and Embroidery Machines

Threads & Accessories

Accessories such as tailor's chalk, elastic, measuring scales, and tailor-friendly scissors further complement their offerings

Services:
-Product Consultation
Al Suroor’s experienced team assists in selecting the right equipment tailored to specific business needs, from small tailoring shops to large garment factories.

-Maintenance and After-Sales Support
The company offers ongoing support, including maintenance, repairs, and spare parts for all their machines to ensure long-term performance.

-Delivery and Installation
They provide prompt delivery services and ensure machines are installed and set up properly for seamless operation.

Al Suroor Sewing Equipment LLC is committed to supplying the highest quality industrial sewing solutions for professionals in the fashion and tailoring industries across the UAE.

Name: 株式会社ギャレット
Description:
■ファッションのトータルプロデュース
アパレル＆ファ ッション雑貨における企画立案から販売戦略までトレンド、機能、実用性など、顧客ニーズに応じたチャネルでトータルプロデュースする会社です。

■品質管理
社内に品質管理室を独自に設け、資格保有者含め４人体制で、当社全ての商品のクオリティチェックを日々行っております。強度、堅牢度等の検査から、外部との連携によりより高度な検査まで、ギャレットクオリティを信頼の証としてお客様に安心してご愛用いただけるモノづくりを心掛けております。

■トレンド
マーケットリサーチ、欧米各国のコレクション情報、お取引先様からの情報など、常に情報収集に努め、独自のデータ分析をもとに商品化をしております。 お客様からのご要望にも瞬時にお答えできるだけの情報を常にストックし、提案・供給に努めております。

■生産背景
お客様に価値ある品質の商品を提供するために、国内には奈良に靴下自社工場と縫製工場、ベトナム・ハイフォンに独資の自社工場を構えております。そして中国・上海には「G-FACTORY CHINA吉発得利（上海）貿易有限公司」を置き、 現地にて商品調達及び生産プロセスを堅実なものにしております。

■オリジナルブランド
メンズ、レディース含めたオリジナルブランドのファッションアイテムを展開しております。カジュアル、アウトドア、ナチュラルテイストの商品をはじめ、トレンドに合わせた商品を毎シーズン発表しています。

■ライセンスブランド
国内外で人気のブランド、キャラクターのライセンスを独自のルートにて取得し、オリジナル、コラボレーション、OEMを含む企画・生産・流通・販売を行っております。

■海外輸入・輸出
アメリカ・ロサンゼルスに支社を置き、海外ブランドの輸入代理業務を行っています。また、海外得意先様に 自社ブランド商材及びOEM商材の製造販売を行っています。アメリカ、カナダ、イギリス、イタリア、フランス、オーストラリア、中国、韓国、シンガポールなどのセレクトショップに自社商品を販売しております。

■販売代理店
アメリカ製バンダナブランド“HAV-A-HANK”、バッグブランド“EASTPAK”の日本における正規代理店として活動しており、他にも、欧米のブランドを中心に、様々なブランドの代理店およびインポート業務を行っております。
Location: 名古屋市北区, 愛知県

Name: À La Pendule - Maison Sablaise
Description:
C’est en 2014, dans une douce ambiance estivale, qu’À La Pendule voit le jour !
Quoi de plus naturel pour cette marque locale, ancrée sur la “plus belle plage d’Europe” que de s’identifier à l’icône incontournable de notre cité balnéaire ? Celle-ci trônant au milieu du remblai, face à l’océan, sous les yeux de tous depuis 1956…
Ce symbole poétique et désuet que représente la Pendule, vient nous imprégner de son architecture légèrement surannée et graphique.

Inspirée de l’univers sablais et de l’air marin, nos illustrations jouent avec les souvenirs de nombreuses générations, entre héritage historique de la belle époque, des bains de mer et un graphisme actuel et épuré.

Après 2 années endormies à l’ombre de la Pendule et les pieds dans l’eau, la petite Maison Sablaise renaît en 2020 sous les crayons de Jimmy, sablais de souche.

Découvrez nos modèles iconiques, nos collections saisonnières et plongez dans une ambiance estivale, empreinte de soleil, de sable et d’eau salée !

Name: Textrade
Description:
En tant qu’auto-entrepreneur, je suis un acteur clé de la chaîne de distribution de vêtements en gros, avec un volume d’achat 40 à  60 tonnes par semaine. Je me spécialise dans l’acquisition de vêtements collectés auprès de fournisseurs variés, pour les revendre à des entreprises expertes dans le tri et la valorisation textile en Espagne.
Grâce à un réseau solide d’une dizaine de partenaires réguliers, je fournis un approvisionnement conséquent et fiable, répondant aux besoins de clients professionnels exigeants. Mon rôle stratégique permet à mes partenaires de se concentrer sur le tri, la revente ou le recyclage, tout en ayant la certitude d’un flux constant et diversifié de produits.
Mon activité combine efficacité, régularité et vision durable : en facilitant la redistribution des vêtements collectés, je contribue à un marché du textile plus responsable et à une économie circulaire active. Fiable et engagé, je m’assure que chaque transaction soit structurée et professionnelle, offrant à mes partenaires un approvisionnement optimisé et adapté à leur développement.

Name: Gütermann Polska
Description:
Witaj w świecie najwyższej jakości nici marki A&E Gütermann! Jesteśmy dumnym autoryzowanym dystrybutorem tych wyjątkowych nici, które są niezastąpione dla profesjonalistów branży krawieckiej i projektantów modowych na całym świecie.

Nasza firma reprezentuje nie tylko markę, ale również wartości, na których się opieramy. Dążymy do dostarczania naszym klientom nici, które nie tylko spełniają ich oczekiwania, ale przewyższają je. Nasze nici A&E Gütermann są wynikiem innowacyjnej technologii MCT (Micro Core Technology), którą A&E Gütermann opracował jako jedyna firma na rynku. Ta technologia pozwala nam zapewnić niespotykaną wytrzymałość i trwałość, co czyni nasze produkty niezrównanymi w swojej klasie.

Nieustannie poszukujemy doskonałości, zarówno w naszych produktach, jak i w obsłudze klienta. Nasz zespół składa się z pasjonatów, którzy nie tylko rozumieją potrzeby naszych klientów, ale także podejmują wszelkie wysiłki, aby je zaspokoić. Dzięki naszej wiedzy i doświadczeniu jesteśmy w stanie doradzić w wyborze odpowiednich nici do konkretnych projektów oraz zapewnić wsparcie na każdym etapie współpracy.

Nasze nici są nie tylko doskonałe pod względem jakości, ale także wszechstronne w zastosowaniu. Idealnie sprawdzają się przy szyciu różnorodnych materiałów, w tym tkanin, dzianin, wyrobów skórzanych, materiałów technicznych oraz tapicerki meblowej. Dzięki naszym produktom, Twoje projekty będą odznaczać się nie tylko estetyką, ale także niezawodnością i trwałością.

Dołącz do naszej społeczności profesjonalistów szyciowych i odkryj, dlaczego nasi klienci uznają nasze nici za najlepsze na rynku. Razem możemy osiągnąć wyjątkowe rezultaty i podnieść jakość naszych projektów do nieosiągalnych dotąd poziomów!

Jeśli masz jakiekolwiek pytania lub chcesz się dowiedzieć więcej o naszych produktach i usługach, nie wahaj się skontaktować z nami. Jesteśmy tu, aby Ci pomóc i wesprzeć Cię w każdym kroku Twojej szyciowej podróży.

Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Name: SOHMO
Description:
With a passion for sewing and crafting, Sonya Morris set out to create a brand that would provide high-quality tools for creative minds. And thus, SOHMO was born. With a focus on quality, SOHMO's collection of tailoring shears, embroidery scissors, and pins have quickly become must-haves for sewers and crafters alike.

Sonya's attention to detail and dedication to craftsmanship is evident in each and every SOHMO product. Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting out, SOHMO has the perfect tools for you to bring your creations to life.

Sonya founded SOHMO in Melbourne, Australia in 2018. Disappointed by the lacklustre selection of poorly made sewing tools available at chain stores, Sonya embarked on a journey to find quality sewing tools that are made to last. SOHMO is the result of many years of consideration and investigation to source quality, useful sewing tools. The result is a collection of the highest quality intended to be used for many years to come.

Today, sewing is no longer a necessity for making ends meet, but rather a relaxing pastime. As such, we believe one should surround themselves with quality tools that make the process enjoyable. Don’t underestimate the delight of experiencing a pair of sharp scissors cutting through layers of heavy linen, or strong smooth pins gliding through silk and cotton fabrics.

Name: Greenmarket Club
Description:
At GreenMArket, we embark on a unique journey, seamlessly blending the allure of vintage treasures with the pulse of contemporary streetwear. Our mission is to redefine sustainable fashion by curating a distinctive collection that transcends time, embodying style, individuality, and eco-conscious choices.

We strive to be more than just a thrift store; we are a lifestyle brand committed to reducing our environmental footprint while celebrating the diversity of fashion through the ages. Our mission is threefold:

Curate Timeless Style:
We aim to provide a carefully curated selection of high-quality, pre-loved fashion pieces that stand the test of time. From vintage gems to modern streetwear, each item in our store tells a story and invites our customers to embrace their unique style journey.

Promote Sustainability:
We are dedicated to fostering a sustainable and circular fashion ecosystem. By extending the life cycle of clothing through thrifting, we actively contribute to reducing textile waste and minimizing the environmental impact of fast fashion. Our commitment to sustainability extends to our operations, from eco-friendly packaging to responsible sourcing practices.

Empower Self-Expression:
GreenMarket Club is more than a place to shop; it's a platform for self-expression. We believe that fashion is a powerful form of personal storytelling, and our mission is to empower individuals to embrace their authenticity through the art of dressing. We celebrate diversity, inclusivity, and the freedom to express oneself through unique and affordable fashion choices.

As we navigate the intersection of vintage charm and contemporary flair, we invite our community to join us in making conscious fashion choices that transcend trends. Together, let's redefine style, one timeless piece at a time, as we create a sustainable and stylish future for fashion enthusiasts and the planet alike."

Name: NALORA SECRET
Description:
We're Nalora Secret
We empower resellers to buy what they love and to find one-of-a-kind products from the best indie brands.


Our mission
We created Nalora Secret because we believe everyone deserves a chance to follow their passions. If you’re an emerging reseller looking to grow your business, or searching the perfect set of products to stock your store with, our wholesale market has everything you need.

With Nalora Secret, it’s truly never been easier to buy wholesale. It’s time to find success doing what you love! We’ll be here to help you every step of the way.


We understand retail
We know that retail is personal. In fact, it isn't really about getting or placing orders. It's about relationships. It’s about a store owner buying tried-and-true favorites to delight their regular local customer: the mom around the corner, the couple up the block. It’s about a brand finding a new home offline, in the careful hands of a Store Manager who’s eager to sell their line and tell their story. It’s about retailers and brands meeting face-to-face, or the occasional phone call, where retailers can quickly share feedback, and brands can share updates. The best retail experiences - the stores we all love - are powered by an invisible web of small businesses championing each other and cheering each other on.


We think wholesale should be fun and hassle-free
Nalora Secret’s platform is simple and straightforward for resellers. Our slick order management tools, shipping guidelines, invoicing system, Direct Messaging feature and more make online wholesale a breeze. That way, retailers can focus on fine-tuning their assortments, inventory planning, and engaging customers. We’re built to help you succeed - and sell! That’s what Nalora Secret is all about.

Name: Dongdaemun Fashion Town Special Tourism Zone Council
Description:
Dongdaemun Fashion Town Tourism Special Zone Council

Seoul, Republic of Korea | Established 2000 | Non-Profit Organization

At the heart of Seoul lies Dongdaemun Fashion Town — one of the world’s largest and most dynamic fashion ecosystems.
Here, traditional markets meet futuristic retail, and creativity thrives 24 hours a day.

Since its founding in 2000, the Dongdaemun Fashion Town Tourism Special Zone Council has been dedicated to promoting the district as a global fashion and cultural destination, bridging heritage, innovation, and tourism.
Designated as an official Tourism Special Zone by the Korean Ministry of Culture and Tourism in 2002, the Council now represents over 30,000 members, including business leaders, designers, and cultural innovators.

 Our Mission

To transform Dongdaemun into a world-class fashion and tourism hub, driving:
-Sustainable growth for local merchants and designers
-Cultural and creative exchange with global cities
-Digital innovation, branding, and K-Culture collaboration

 Organizational Overview

President & Executive Board
-2 Honorary Presidents, 2 Vice Presidents, 25 Delegates, and ~20,000 active members
-Advisory Committee and Legal Counsel
-Secretariat Office: 3F, Pyeonghwa Market, 274 Cheonggyecheon-ro, Jung-gu, Seoul

Core Divisions
-External Cooperation Committee: International partnerships & trade exchange
-Operations Committee: Festival and event management
-Public Relations Committee: Global branding and media outreach
-Content Committee: K-Culture and creative content projects

 Global Partnerships

We proudly collaborate with partner cities and organizations worldwide — from Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Moscow to Mongolia and Southeast Asia — building bridges through trade, culture, and tourism.

 Dongdaemun at a Glance
-31 major fashion complexes (25 wholesale / 6 retail)
-30,000 stores employing over 100,000 people
-1.5 million daily visitors / 5 million foreign tourists annually

When we searched all over the domestic e-commerce platforms and wanted to buy a set of intelligent, practical, safe and worry-free electrothermal clothing for ourselves, we found that in this field we have been focusing on for a long time, there are not too many mature products in the domestic market that can meet our "picking" and "entanglements". 

Inspired by this, we came to the stage behind the scenes and founded the our own brand, a first-line down clothing manufacturer in the United Nations, integrating our new generation of carbon fiber heating, ultra-low temperature digital lithium battery, and APP intelligent control technology, designed and launched the winter electric heating clothing series. 

There is a long way to go. We will continue to pursue professionally and continue to transform professional technical advantages into product advantages, so that consumers can enjoy the warmth brought by the world's latest electric heating technology at the same time!

Description:

Con l’obiettivo di diventare un punto di riferimento nel settore, l’azienda offre un servizio di alta qualità, accompagnato da una selezione vasta e diversificata di prodotti che vanno dallo stile classico allo streetwear, per rispondere alle diverse esigenze del mercato.

La missione di D3Fashiongroup è di rendere accessibili articoli esclusivi e autentici, supportando i clienti nella scelta dei capi più adatti, sempre in linea con le ultime tendenze. Grazie a un team di esperti con oltre vent'anni di esperienza nel settore, combinato con nuove risorse giovani e dinamiche, l'azienda riesce a garantire una selezione aggiornata e in continua espansione.

Nel panorama della moda odierna, sempre più orientata verso l’esclusività, reperire articoli delle maison più prestigiose può risultare difficile. D3Fashiongroup risponde a questa sfida grazie a una rete di contatti qualificati, che le consente di assistere i clienti nella ricerca dei prodotti desiderati, offrendo supporto lungo l’intero processo commerciale, dalla selezione all’acquisto. L’obiettivo è garantire soluzioni personalizzate, che rispondano alle esigenze specifiche di boutique, rivenditori e grossisti.

In sintesi, D3Fashiongroup si propone come un partner affidabile e competente nel commercio di abbigliamento all’ingrosso, capace di fornire capi esclusivi, rispondendo in modo efficiente alle richieste di un mercato in continua evoluzione.

Мы искренне верим, что даже самые технологически продвинутые компании могут выразить свою уникальность и корпоративную культуру через качественный мерчандайзинг. Name: American Tulip LLC
Description:
American Tulip LLC is a premium textile wholesale distribution company dedicated to serving North American retailers with high-quality fabrics and finished garments. Founded in 2024, we operate from strategic locations in Florida and New York, positioning us to efficiently serve retailers across the United States and Canada.

OUR MISSION
We bridge the gap between quality textile manufacturing and North American retail markets, providing retailers with premium fabrics and apparel that meet the highest standards of quality, style, and value. Our commitment is to deliver exceptional products, reliable service, and competitive wholesale pricing that helps our retail partners succeed and grow their businesses.

WHAT WE OFFER
American Tulip specializes in premium athleisure and apparel fabrics, with a focus on innovative materials and trending styles. Our product portfolio includes:

Premium scuba fabric collections for athleisure wear
High-quality fleece and knit fabrics
Finished garments including quarter-zip hoodies, crewnecks, and high-rise shorts
Custom color selections and seasonal collections
Trend-forward designs that resonate with today's consumers

OUR APPROACH
We understand the challenges retailers face in sourcing quality textiles at competitive prices. That's why we've built our business on three core principles:

Quality First: Every fabric and garment meets rigorous quality standards before reaching our clients. We personally oversee product development and quality control to ensure consistency and excellence.

Reliability: We maintain strong inventory levels and efficient logistics to ensure timely delivery. Our dual-location operations in Florida and New York enable us to serve clients quickly and efficiently across North America.

Partnership: We don't just sell textiles—we build lasting partnerships. Our team works closely with retailers to understand their needs, anticipate market trends, and deliver products that drive their success.

Name: Anom Denim
Description:
About Anom: An Ode to Authenticity in Your Story

In a world where individuality can be drowned out, Anom Denim champions the belief that anonymity is the catalyst for authentic self-expression. We see you as the author of your own narrative, and Anom Denim is the canvas upon which your unique story unfolds. With our denim, embrace the power to wear your truths with unwavering confidence every day.

Crafted with Purpose

At Anom, our logo isn't just a symbol; it's a revelation of our mission. The 'O' signifies conformity, the '/' is a nod to YOU—the protagonist of your story—and the 'Ø' boldly proclaims our commitment to 'Cut through conformity.' Each stitch in our denim is purposeful, encouraging you to break free from the ordinary and embrace your extraordinary self.

Stay Genuine, Be Different

Anom celebrates the authenticity that makes you, you. We invite you to stay genuine and be different, boldly rejecting the mundane. Our denim is more than fabric; it's an embodiment of the courage it takes to forge your own path. Wear Anom as your statement, a declaration of independence in a world that thrives on conformity.

Your Story, Your Denim

Anom Denim is more than a brand; it's a collaborator in the story of your life. Every pair of jeans is a chapter, a testament to the hero's journey you're navigating. We invite you to wear your denim as an emblem of your unique narrative, a tangible expression of your unwavering authenticity.

Embrace Your Uniqueness

Embark on this journey with Anom, where we celebrate the beauty of staying genuine. Connect with us on social media, share your stories, and become part of the Anom community. With Anom Denim, authenticity is not just a choice; it's a way of life.
Thank you for choosing Anom—where denim is not just clothing; it's a conduit for your authentic self.

Warm regards,

The Anom Team

Name: Contare Pty Ltd
Description:
About Contare | Quality Men's Sleepwear
Contare is an Australian Men’s sleepwear brand with a long-standing reputation for delivering reliable quality in sleep and loungewear. Our collections are shaped by practical insight, designed to meet the needs of real customers, and supported by a supply chain built on consistency. For 45 years, we’ve been a trusted partner for independent retailers across Australia and, more recently, expanding into the New Zealand market.

We specialise in premium Men’s Pyjama Sets, Nightshirts and Robes, but also offer sleep separates, with inclusive sizing from S to 7XL. Each piece is made with carefully selected materials that prioritise breathability, softness, and longevity - bringing comfort and confidence to sleep and rest routines of all kinds. Our product comes individually packaged ready for display via merchandising cubby hole units, shelving and some by small prong hanging.

The name Contare comes from the Italian word for “count,” reflecting our focus on fabric thread count/quality. From restful nights at home to hospital stays, assisted living, and travel wardrobes, Contare sleepwear delivers more than comfort - we offer dignity, practicality, and ease.

Still proudly a small business, we understand the needs of independent retailers because we are one. We’re committed to building thoughtful, long-term partnerships grounded in trust, support, and shared values. We’re excited to now be sharing our story with like-minded retailers across the globe!

Bienvenido a Consein! 

Desde 1995, hemos estado al frente de la industria de la moda y venta al por mayor en Ecuador, especializándonos en uniformes industriales que son tan únicos como las industrias que atendemos. Con más de 25 años de experiencia, nos enorgullecemos de coser calidad y cuidado en cada prenda que creamos.

No solo nos importa el estilo; estamos comprometidos con la sostenibilidad. Como un actor responsable en la industria de la moda, entendemos el impacto que tienen los textiles en el calentamiento global. Por eso, nos esforzamos por minimizar el desperdicio y promover prácticas ecológicas en nuestros procesos de producción. Además, realizamos donaciones anuales a fundaciones como Cáritas, porque creemos en retribuir a nuestra comunidad.

Siempre estamos en busca de personas motivadas y orientadas a objetivos para unirse a nuestro equipo. Si te apasiona hacer la diferencia y conectar con los clientes para mejorar la experiencia laboral de sus empleados, nos encantaría saber de ti!

Transformemos juntos la experiencia del uniforme industrial!

Name: Pasamanería Italiana
Description:
Pasamanería Italiana es una empresa familiar de origen italiano, que nació de la mezcla de culturas y experiencias de su fundador en el mundo textil hace más de 50 años.
En sus orígenes, la compañía nació para crear artículos de pasamanería; cordones, galones, flecos, soutaches, borlas, tapacosturas, pompones, alamares… Modelos y colores únicos, diseñados y fabricados algunos a mano, otros con maquinaria muy especializada a partir de las
ideas de los clientes, siempre aconsejados y guiados por nuestros profesionales. Artículos exclusivos ideados para el mundo de la decoración de interiores y luminarias, y también para el sector de la moda, para el que somos referentes pasamaneros en un gran número de diseñadores de grandes cadenas españolas del sector textil.
Con el paso de los años, el sector de la iluminación decorativa nos fue demandando los cables eléctricos decorados, y fue a partir de ahí cuando introdujimos este producto, clave también en nuestro negocio. Recubrimos todo tipo de cables, de cualquier sección, número de
conductores y tipos: redondos, planos, trenzados…
Conseguimos así, una personalización a medida en el mundo de iluminación: decoramos las pantallas con flecos y galones fabricados al gusto del cliente, y además proporcionamos las conexiones montadas a medida para la misma lámpara: cable textil con clavija e interruptor a
juego. Todos nuestros materiales cumplen con las más altas exigencias en certificaciones. Nuestra presencia en Europa se amplía ahora a otros mercados, ya que contamos con la certificación UL; nuestros cables son aptos también para el mercado canadiense y americano. La personalización de diseños y proyectos a medida nos define. La exclusividad que otorgamos al cliente, así como la calidad de nuestros productos nos han hecho evolucionar hacia otras áreas más sofisticadas. Actualmente, colaboramos con partners junto con los que realizamos proyectos requeridos por escaparatistas de renombre tanto a nivel nacional como internacional

Description:
Il nostro sguardo volge agli anni in cui eravamo alla ricerca della verità e della bellezza. Quando abbiamo
scoperto l’ostinazione dell’ambizione, l’essenza dei rapporti. I nostri capi sono pensati per vivere questi
momenti. E’ questo che conta davvero, prima di qualsiasi altra cosa. Perché le tradizioni esistono.
Ispirati dal sogno del college americano, abbiamo creato nel 1996 il nostro brand MARSHALL ANGEL, che
guarda all’America come ideale di libertà e opportunità e all’Italia come tradizione e artigianalità.
I capi MA sono pensati per far sentire a proprio agio chiunque li indossi. Frequentare il college significa andare oltre
le convenzioni, superando le singole identità, esplorando noi stessi e il mondo per sviluppare una propria
individualità nel gruppo. Gli ideali non hanno genere, i nostri vestiti nemmeno. La collezione nasce dall’incontro tra
ricami, stampe consumate, lavaggi dall’effetto vintage e tessuti innovativi.
I nostri standard sono alti, molto alti. Dai primi bozzetti fino all’ultimo ricamo, dedichiamo ad ogni capo una cura
maniacale, per garantire una lavorazione artigianale sempre di altissimo livello. Sappiamo che i dettagli sono
fondamentali per trasformare ciò che indossiamo in una naturale espressione di noi stessi.

RS Apparel stands as a seasoned force in garment manufacturing and export, tracing its heritage back to 1960. Renowned for its premium craftsmanship and precision, RS Apparel specializes in bespoke private label manufacturing, catering to a diverse clientele across the UK, Europe, Australia, and the UAE markets.

With a monthly capacity exceeding 25,000 units, the company harmonizes artisanal expertise with innovative sustainable practices, setting industry benchmarks in quality and design. Their dedication to blending tradition with innovation echoes in each garment, reflecting trend-setting designs alongside timeless classics.

Embracing a commitment to quality, RS Apparel meticulously controls each phase of production, from sourcing premium materials to conducting rigorous quality checks adhering to international standards. Their emphasis on technological advancements and textile innovations ensures a seamless fusion of comfort, durability, and style in every stitch.

The company's ethos revolves around partnership, considering clients as esteemed collaborators. This philosophy extends to their internal team, fostering a sense of shared vision and collective success. RS Apparel's core values embody a relentless pursuit of client satisfaction, unwavering quality standards, a teamwork-driven culture, an aversion to saying no, and a dedication to perpetual innovation.

In essence, RS Apparel isn't merely a manufacturing and exporting factory; it's a curator of experiences, elevating wardrobes, exceeding expectations, and redefining the global landscape of garment craftsmanship.

Welcome to Shezaya, your premier destination for exquisite women's clothing for wholesale. Our competitive pricing ensures that you can enjoy the latest trends and styles without breaking the bank. Cette société est totalement indépendante de toutes les marques du marché. 
Spécialisée dans les produits techniques et lingerie haut de gamme elle est leader européen en lingerie post opératoire sous marque de distributeur. 
Elle a une expertise en lingerie sport, dos nu, maternité, lingerie grande taille et séduction.

DSP Lingerie France offre à ses clients une solution FOB intégrant prototypage, mise au point, sourcing, fabrication en zone délocalisée. 
La force de DSP lingerie est de proposer des produits haut de gamme à prix complets (full service) sur des petits volumes. 
Les clients de DSP Lingerie sont des marques références mondiales dans leurs secteurs ou des marques à fort potentiel, désireuses de renforcer leurs moyens commerciaux et marketing en s'appuyant sur un industriel performant et intégré afin de réduire les charges fixes de R&D et les risques d'invendu (petit volume).
